videos.title: How To Manipulate The Goalie From The Blue Line
videos.summary_source_text:
How To Manipulate The Goalie From The Blue Line The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: +4 Handicap Golfer In For A Live Fitting On The Tiger Woods Irons at The Trott Shop
videos.summary_source_text:
+4 Handicap Golfer In For A Live Fitting On The Tiger Woods Irons at The Trott Shop +4 Handicap Golfer in for a LIVE FITTING on the Tiger Woods Iron at The Trott Shop

This is a #tourtrucktuesday LIVE FITTING treat as Rob Perea visits The Trott Shop for a full bag fitting. 

The P7TW Tiger Woods Iron goes in and we look at matching his set into the woods. This is a fitting with a twist too as the iron shaft choice might not be what you’d expect.

If you’re interested in taking your game to the next level and this type of service is all you then go to www.thetrott.shop to reserve your spot.

Come and see for yourself, The Trott Shop at La Valle Coastal Club. We offer the Tour fitting and build experience directly to golfers seeking the best.

Learn more: https://thetrott.shop

Book a Tour Fitting Experience: https://thetrott.shop/pages/bookings

Whether you need a full bag fitting, driver upgrade, or custom club build, we’ve got you covered.

Our in-house coach, Skyler Finnell, is a Grass League professional, former PGA Tour Latin America player, and resident instructor.

Book a lesson with Skyler: https://thetrott.shop/pages/bookings

Stay connected by subscribing to the Trottie Golf newsletter for new content, equipment releases, Tour insights, and more at: https://pages.trottiegolf.com/tourtrucktuesday-sign-up-form

Follow 2 Chainz: https://www.instagram.com/twochainzev?igsh=NTc4MTIwNjQ2YQ==

Listen to The Dope Stroke Podcast: https://open.spotify.com/show/6qNRL9oNGY7RPeiup5yfF3

As always, thanks for watching. If you enjoyed the video, please like, #subscribe , and drop a #comment below. 

Your support allows us to continue bringing Tour-level equipment knowledge directly to golfers everywhere.

videos.title: Stars Qualify Robertson, Bourque & Hyry As Talks Continue On Eve Of Free Agency | DLLS Stars Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Stars Qualify Robertson, Bourque & Hyry As Talks Continue On Eve Of Free Agency | DLLS Stars Podcast Become a DIEHARD! alldlls.com/diehard

On Monday the Dallas Stars issued qualifying offers to restricted free agents Jason Robertson, Mavrik Bourque and Arttu Hyry. They also chose not to extend qualifying offers to eight players, most of whom played for the Texas Stars, their AHL affiliate. NHL Free Agency starts tomorrow (Wednesday, July 1st), so today’s show is all about previewing that. We will look at what the next steps are for the team’s RFAs, the unqualified players who will become unrestricted free agents tomorrow and the team’s UFAs who head into July 1st with uncertainty in their status with Dallas. We will also take a glance at the free agent pool for the entire league.

videos.title: The BEST Affordable Zero Torque Putter (NOT a Temu Fake)
videos.summary_source_text:
The BEST Affordable Zero Torque Putter (NOT a Temu Fake) Zero torque putters have taken over golf over the last couple of years, but there's one big problem. Most premium options, like the LAB putters, cost $600+ and the market has since been flooded with cheap copies and fake zero torque putters from sites like Temu.

In this video, I test what could genuinely be one of the best budget zero torque putters I've ever used. I wasn't expecting much, but you can judge from my reaction whether this affordable option is actually the real deal or just another gimmick.

I'll compare the feel, forgiveness, roll, distance control and overall performance to see whether this putter can compete with the premium zero torque models without the premium price tag. If you're considering a LAB putter but don't want to spend over $600, this review could save you a lot of money.

If you're looking for honest golf equipment reviews, putting tips and golf instruction that will genuinely help you shoot lower scores, make sure you subscribe so you don't miss future videos.

videos.title: JUST A PINCH OF THIS IN YOUR MORNING COFFEE...YOUR BODY WILL LOVE IT | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
JUST A PINCH OF THIS IN YOUR MORNING COFFEE...YOUR BODY WILL LOVE IT | Dr. Mandell If you drink coffee every morning, this simple habit may be one of the easiest ways to make your favorite beverage even healthier. In this video, I'll show you why adding a small amount of unsweetened cacao powder to your morning coffee can enhance its rich flavor while providing naturally occurring flavanols, polyphenols, antioxidants, and important minerals that have been studied for their potential role in supporting healthy circulation, blood vessel function, brain health, and overall wellness. You'll learn the difference between pure cacao powder and sugary chocolate drink mixes, how much to use, the best way to mix it into your coffee, and why this simple upgrade can help you enjoy a naturally rich chocolate flavor without relying on sugar-filled creamers or flavored syrups. We'll also discuss the science behind cacao, what current research suggests about its potential health benefits, and why no single food is a miracle—but how small, healthy habits repeated consistently can make a meaningful difference over time. If you're looking for practical, evidence-informed ways to improve your health, boost your nutrition, and make smarter choices every day, this video is for you. As always, remember that good health is built one healthy habit at a time. Watch until the end, and let me know in the comments if you've ever tried adding unsweetened cacao to your coffee or if you're going to give it a try tomorrow morning.

videos.title: WTF is China building now 😂
videos.summary_source_text:
WTF is China building now 😂 The future is here, and it’s ready to take your crap 😂

This is a self driving toilet called Xiaoban made by Chinese company Yueban that just debuted at a Shanghai aged-care expo.

You just summon it to your bedside and it has a built-in bidet. When you’re done, it autonomously drives to your regular bathroom, dumps the waste into the toilet, scrubs its own bowl, and docks itself to recharge and refill.

Obviously this was made for folks with mobility issues, and it’s pretty cool that tech has come this far to be able to help people in this way! 

At the same time, I can’t help but imagine some people using this just for fun or out of laziness.

videos.title: Fix Your Inside Takeaway: Get On Plane
videos.summary_source_text: Fix Your Inside Takeaway: Get On Plane Click link in bio for lowest price on the SLR3. If your club keeps getting dragged to the inside and you want to stay perfectly on plane, I’ll show you the feel you need: the clubhead staying outside your hands in the takeaway. If you’ve been struggling with driver, comment “solid” and I’ll send you a free series of videos to help you hit it solid and straight. I also demonstrate my training aid, the SLR3 Bumblebee (SLR = shallow lag release), using its yellow band as a visual to keep the club outside the hands, then letting the band’s tension naturally shallow the club, create lag, and teach a full release to avoid casting and a chicken wing. Do five reps, stay passive, then hit balls and let the band do the work. Want your own SLR3 Bumblebee? Click the link in my bio. Click link in bio for lowest price on the SLR3. videos.summary_source_text:
You’re Shallowing the Club Too Late. Do This Instead ⛳️ Take Your FREE Game Assessment → https://meandmygolf.com/game-plan/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=30.06.26

📱 Download the Swing Coach App (2-Week Free Trial) → https://go.meandmygolf.com/swingcoach/yt/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=30.06.26

A lot of golfers are trying to shallow the golf club with their hands and arms, but the real problem often starts much earlier.

In this lesson, we look at why a good golfer was getting too steep in the downswing, even though he was actively trying to shallow the club. The issue was not simply the hands. It came from how his upper body and spine were positioned at the top of the backswing.

When the spine leans too much towards the target, the body can force the club to steepen early. From there, the golfer has to make a late compensation to shallow it out. 

Better players tend to do the opposite: they prepare the body better, shallow the club earlier, then rotate and apply speed later.

In this video, we’ll show you what most golfers get wrong, how the best players create the conditions to shallow the club, and what to look for in your own swing.

videos.title: Gemini 5: The 1 Million Token, 4× Faster Model Nobody Actually Has
videos.summary_source_text:
Gemini 5: The 1 Million Token, 4× Faster Model Nobody Actually Has Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Everyone's arguing about "Gemini 5" beating GPT-5.5 — except Google never announced it, never shipped it, never priced it. So what are all those leaked benchmarks actually measuring? This is the grounded breakdown: what Google has really released (Gemini 3.5 Flash + Omni), the big numbers behind the hype — 1 million token context, 4× faster generation, $9 per million output tokens — and where a real next-gen Gemini is genuinely heading.

If you'd rather treat a model as real AFTER Google confirms it instead of riding the rumor wave, that's the whole point of this channel → Subscribe so you get the version-number-free version every time.

⏱️ CHAPTERS
00:00 Intro — The Gemini 5 Myth
01:01 So What Is "Gemini 5," Really?
02:23 What's Actually Real: Multimodality & Omni
03:45 Speed vs Smarts: The Trade-Off Thumbnails Hide
04:51 The Naming Mess: Flash, Pro, Omni, Spark
05:51 What It Actually Costs
07:01 The Agentic Stuff: Tools, Function Calling, Antigravity
08:05 Where It Falls Down
08:59 Who Should Actually Care
09:53 How to Actually Try It

— THE QUICK VERSION —
- There is no Gemini 5. The lineup tops out at Gemini 3.5 Flash (May 2026) + Gemini Omni video.
- 1M token context is real — feed it a full PDF, repo, or hours of transcript in one shot.
- "4× faster" is real… but it costs a few % on the hardest reasoning/coding tasks vs GPT-5.5. It's a trade, not a free win.
- Knowledge cutoff is Jan 2025. No fine-tuning, no offline/open weights, still hallucinates. Architectural limits a "5" inherits.
- Best fit: multimodal work, live-search-grounded answers, high-volume low-latency services.

💬 Drop a comment: sold on the speed-over-smarts trade, or do you still want the model that's a few percent smarter even if it's slower?

videos.title: Matthew Schaefer Chats with the 2026 Draft Class | NHL Backstage Presented by Chipotle
videos.summary_source_text:
Matthew Schaefer Chats with the 2026 Draft Class | NHL Backstage Presented by Chipotle Join Kate Pettersen, Jonny Lazarus and Matthew Schaefer for an exclusive all-access look behind the scenes at the 2026 NHL Draft in Buffalo. Follow the top prospects as they walk the red carpet, experience the excitement inside KeyBank Center, and hear from the newest members of the NHL family moments after realizing their NHL dreams.

Schaefer returns to the Draft as a Calder Trophy winner after a historic rookie season with the New York Islanders. Watch as he appears on Sportsnet and ESPN broadcasts, announces the Islanders' first-round selection on stage, reflects on his own Draft Day memories from one year ago, and joins the crew as a guest host for exclusive interviews with the 2026 Draft class.

Featuring casual conversations with No. 1 overall pick Gavin McKenna as well as Ivar Stenberg, Caleb Malhotra, Daxon Rudolph, Alberts Smits, Keaton Verhoeff and more of the top selections from the 2026 NHL Draft.

videos.title: Kenan vs. Kel | Hot Ones Versus
videos.summary_source_text:
Kenan vs. Kel | Hot Ones Versus Kenan Thompson and Kel Mitchell are an iconic comedy duo known for such classics as Good Burger and All That. They’ve reunited to launch their new game Orange Pop!, now available in the App Store. But today these lifelong friends have two choices: Tell the truth, or suffer the wrath of the Last Dab. Whoever eats the most wings, loses!

From naming Kenan’s characters voices, to identifying orange beverages, these friends will either need to be honest, or go head-to-head with the Wings of Death. Does Kenan know Kel’s love language? Who can make the most burgers in 30 seconds? Tune in to an all-new episode of Hot Ones Versus, and see who takes home the coveted chicken wing trophy!

videos.title: X Just Dropped an Official MCP Server
videos.summary_source_text:
X Just Dropped an Official MCP Server Join the community 🎉 https://mrc.fm/cmc

I just got my hands on the brand new official X MCP and this one's a big deal. X has finally launched its own hosted Model Context Protocol server which means I can plug AI tools like Grok Build and Claude Code straight into the X API using nothing but natural language. No more wrestling with custom integrations or sketchy third party servers I authenticate once with xurl and suddenly my AI agent can search posts, pull trends, read timelines and manage bookmarks in real time. In this stream I walk through exactly how it works, wire it up live, and put it to work so you can see whether it's worth adding to your own agent stack. If you're building anything agentic on top of social data, this is the moment X became a first-class citizen in the AI ecosystem.

videos.title: Learn How to Chip Like a Pro | Padraig Harrington
videos.summary_source_text:
Learn How to Chip Like a Pro | Padraig Harrington As part of my YouTube series  “Ten lessons every golfer should know”, the sixth Paddy’s Golf Tip is on chipping, which is in two parts. 
 
In this first installment,  I explain the fundamentals of chipping - keeping all the weight on the left side, hitting the ball first and then the turf.  I demonstrate how to use a simple training aid to teach those basics, how to use ground force effectively and explain why good chipping helps make you a better iron player, allows you to go for more pins and ultimately improve your scores.

I also demonstrate how to learn to play a simple lob shot, initially using a tee peg to "fresh air" the shot!

#PadraigHarrington #golfing #golftips #paddysgolftips #golf #feedback #chippingtips #chipping 

SUBSCRIBE FOR MORE CONTENT: https://bit.ly/4gKoVme

videos.title: WHAT'S THE PLAN? Carolina Hurricanes Acquire John Carlson's Rights & Give Qualifying Offers
videos.summary_source_text:
WHAT'S THE PLAN? Carolina Hurricanes Acquire John Carlson's Rights & Give Qualifying Offers During the long and busy Day 2 at the 2026 NHL Draft, the Carolina Hurricanes acquired the rights to upcoming unrestricted free agent (UFA) John Carlson from the Anaheim Ducks. They sent back the 192nd pick and restricted free agent (RFA) Kyle Masters. What does it mean now, and what is the plan for Carlson? On the Tuesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on the acquisition of Carlson from the Ducks. Does it make sense to get a few extra days to see if they can sign him before free agency starts on Wednesday? What could a deal even look like for the 36-year-old defenseman? Would he possibly be a piece for something bigger? Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on the overall situation on the defense with Carlson and what could happen with Alexander Nikishin. Is there a world where this is a nothing burger? Finally, Zach concludes the show by sharing his thoughts on the qualifying offers the Hurricanes gave to some guys, while letting some others walk to free agency as UFAs. Could some of them return? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.summary_source_text:
Billiga ost i mataffären sparar 3 000 kr om året, medan ett bilbyte kan spara 96 000 kr om året Skillnaden mellan dyr och billig ost på ICA är typ sextio kronor.

Köper du en ost i veckan är det runt tretusen kronor per år. 

Skillnaden mellan vår Tesla och vår Peugeot? Trettiotusen kronor i månaden mot femtusen. Åttatusen kronors skillnad varje månad. Nästan hundratusen kronor om året.

De flesta silar mygg och sväljer kameler i sin ekonomi. Man bestämmer sig för att förbättra ekonomin och köper billigare ost. Och glömmer att det finns saker som gör tio gånger så stor skillnad för ungefär samma insats.

Osten är inte problemet. Bilen (och boende) är ofta det. Skillnaden mellan dyr och billig ost på ICA är typ sextio kronor.

Is Claude Mythos 6 Real? What Anthropic ACTUALLY Confirmed Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Your feed says "Claude Mythos 6 is here" — leaked model IDs, breathless threads, an influencer narrating a screenshot like insider knowledge. The uncomfortable part: as of today, Anthropic hasn't announced any such model. So let's separate what's actually confirmed about Anthropic's Mythos line from what's pure speculation — what Mythos really does, what a "Mythos 6" would realistically be, what it costs, and whether you could even get it. No hype. Just what the receipts say.

We cover the real lineage (Mythos Preview, Mythos 5, Fable 5), where the "Mythos 6" rumor actually comes from, the vendor-reported benchmark problem nobody screenshots, the export-control suspension that pulled access out from under users, the $10/$50 pricing, and the one habit that protects you from getting burned by a single model again.

videos.title: BMW’s NEW X5 just DESTROYED Mercedes
videos.summary_source_text:
BMW’s NEW X5 just DESTROYED Mercedes The new BMW X5 has been unveiled, and we’re reviewing the design, interior, back seats, boot space, and revealing the different engine & battery options.

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-3006

The all-new BMW X5 is here! 

Mat’s flown over to Germany to get up close and personal with this all-new BMW SUV. The question is, will it be an improvement on the previous generation? Let’s take a closer look…

In terms of the design, one of the most striking elements is the use of the X in the LED headlights! There are two Xs on either side of the front end, used as either adaptive headlights or for the hazard warning lights. They sit on either side of a thin, vertical grille that comes with light surrounds, with all of these sitting above an aggressive-looking front bumper. The bonnet also comes with creases down the centre to give it more presence. Along the side you’ll find door handles which seem to be lifted from the Purosangue, and at the back the taillights stretch across the rear end. 

The inside of the new X5 is super stylish. It comes equipped with the same full-length Panoramic Vision screen as found in the iX3. This sits below the windscreen and comes with a lot of customisable options. There’s also the same infotainment and passenger screens as found in the iX3, with all of the cars functionality and climate controls housed within the former. There’s lots of storage throughout the cabin, and there are soft touch materials across all surfaces high-up in the cabin. 

In terms of engines and batteries, the new X5 has five propulsion choices: Petrol, diesel, plug-in hybrid, electric and hydrogen! However, here in the UK, there are only three options. The first is diesel power, with a 3-litre twin-turbo straight-six that delivers 313hp and 670Nm. Then we have the plug-in hybrid petrol, which has the same size engine as the diesel plus an electric motor. These combine to produce 612hp and 800Nm, and it offers up to 63 miles of electric range. Then finally we have the EV, which has dual motors, a 140kWh battery, and 578hp. It also has a claimed range of up to 497 miles.

We don’t have the prices of the new X5 yet, but the question is, would you choose this over competitors like the all-new Audi Q7? Let us know in the comments!

videos.title: Stop Pushing It Right: 3-Point Setup Checklist
videos.summary_source_text: Stop Pushing It Right: 3-Point Setup Checklist Click link in bio for lowest price on the Blue Brick. If you’re trying to shallow the club or swing more in the slot but you’re scared you’ll hit it right, your release and your setup are probably the issue. Here’s my simple 3-point setup checklist: (1) slide your fingertips down toward your right knee to tilt your body into a draw-friendly position, (2) point your right elbow toward your right belt loop to tuck it in and get your palm more up, and (3) address the club with your right hand more under the grip so the face can naturally roll over instead of staying wide open. Get set up like this, swing normal from the inside, and the ball will draw without forcing it. Want the free bonus on using your arms properly in the downswing and hitting driver straight? Comment “solid.” Click link in bio for lowest price on the Blue Brick. videos.title: Don't Fall For This AI Trap
videos.summary_source_text:
Don't Fall For This AI Trap This is the biggest mistake I see people making with AI.

We’ve all fallen into the trap of trying to use AI for EVERYTHING. But the difference between an AI novice and a power user is knowing when to step back.

The goal isn't to automate your entire life. It's to know which tasks AI should automate, which ones it should help with, and which ones are still better left to humans.

That’s exactly what I’ll be covering in my webinar with @TeachableTV  as part of their AI Academy.

We'll go through a practical framework for deciding what to automate (and what not to), real-world AI workflows you can start using immediately, common automation mistakes to avoid, and how to use AI as a collaborator without sacrificing your own creativity and judgment.

Register at the link in the comments. And while you're there, let me know: what's something you've tried to automate with AI that completely flopped?

videos.title: Fix Plantar Fasciitis with 3 Simple Steps
videos.summary_source_text:
Fix Plantar Fasciitis with 3 Simple Steps Plantar fasciitis relief starts with three simple steps. The third step is designed to help keep it from coming back.

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/4v1Ubna

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Steps:
• Stretch your toes downward 10 times while sitting with your leg crossed, holding each stretch before releasing.
• Follow a low-carb diet to help reduce inflammation.
• Take 400 mg of magnesium glycinate and 20,000 IU of vitamin D.

Plantar fasciitis is often the beginning of a heel spur, which is linked to a problem with calcium. Magnesium and vitamin D are recommended to help address that underlying issue.

#plantarfasciitis #heelpain #footpain #magnesiumglycinate #vitamind #foothealth #stretching #mobility #healthtips #wellness

videos.title: The No. 1 Amateur Golfer in the WORLD is headed to the PGA TOUR | Meet Jackson Koivun
videos.summary_source_text:
The No. 1 Amateur Golfer in the WORLD is headed to the PGA TOUR | Meet Jackson Koivun Ahead of his PGA TOUR debut at the John Deere Classic this week, take a look back at the remarkable rise of Jackson Koivun— the No. 1-ranked amateur golfer in the world.
 
As a sophomore at Auburn University, Koivun earned his PGA TOUR card through the PGA TOUR University Accelerated program. Following one of the most decorated college careers of all time and his recent Low Amateur honors at the 2026 U.S. Open, Koivun is now officially headed to the PGA TOUR. 

"The Acceleration of Jackson Koivun" explores his beginnings, his journey, and what makes him one of the most anticipated professional debuts in history.

LIMITED EDITION MERCH (UK & US)

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:
https://www.youtube.com/@LIVGolf

videos.summary_source_text:
I found the LOST golf boxes... What's in them 🤔 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

videos.title: CSRD i praktiken: Vad kännetecknar företag i framkant?
videos.summary_source_text:
CSRD i praktiken: Vad kännetecknar företag i framkant? Hur står sig er hållbarhetsrapportering? Vi har insikter från över 500 företag!

CSRD förändrar hur företag rapporterar om hållbarhet, men hur ser bästa praxis ut i praktiken? Vi på PwC har analyserat över 500 hållbarhetsrapporter för FY2025 från ledande europeiska företag för att ta reda på det. Resultatet visar tydliga marknads- och branschtrender, vad som utmärker företagen i framkant, var många fortfarande har utmaningar och hur utmaningar kan omvandlas till konkurrensfördelar.

Lyssna in till vår sändning för exklusiva insikter om europeisk och svensk rapporteringspraxis. Oavsett om ni vill finjustera er strategi eller identifiera nästa förbättringsområde så får ni tillgång till insikter och data som kan stärka er hållbarhetsrapportering. Hur står sig er hållbarhetsrapportering? Vi har insikter från över 500 företag!

videos.title: Varför bygger VW och Audi bättre elbilar i Kina?
videos.summary_source_text:
Varför bygger VW och Audi bättre elbilar i Kina? Volkswagen och Audi säger sig bygga framtidens elbilar – men de mest intressanta modellerna verkar inte hamna här. 
I Kina rullar elbilar med snabbare utvecklingstakt, vassare mjukvara, längre räckvidd och mer avancerad teknik än det vi får köpa i Europa.

Så varför bygger de tyska jättarna sina mest konkurrenskraftiga elbilar på andra sidan jorden? Handlar det om kinesiska krav, europeisk tröghet – eller om att VW och Audi helt enkelt har tappat greppet om sin hemmamarknad?
I veckans avsnitt pratar vi om varför Kina-versionerna av Volkswagens och Audis elbilar får Europa-modellerna att kännas gamla redan vid lansering.

Se till att prenumerera så du inte missar något!

videos.title: 29.06.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
29.06.26 - RIFT Presentation RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

RIFT is built around a simple vision: making modern trading technology more accessible while helping users participate in financial markets through a combination of automation, education, and innovative infrastructure. videos.title: Former Altitude Analyst Chris Dempsey Opens Up About Nuggets Broadcast Shakeup | Mood Swings
videos.summary_source_text:
Former Altitude Analyst Chris Dempsey Opens Up About Nuggets Broadcast Shakeup | Mood Swings Former Altitude Sports analyst Chris Dempsey joins Liv Moods on this episode of Mood Swings for an emotional and honest conversation about his departure from Altitude, the massive changes coming to the Denver Nuggets broadcast, and what's next in his career.

Chris opens up about learning that his time at Altitude was coming to an end, reflects on nearly a decade covering the Denver Nuggets on television, and discusses the overwhelming support he's received from fans across Denver. Liv and Chris also dive into the future of the Nuggets, offseason priorities, Payton Watson's value, NBA blockbuster moves, and whether Denver should make a major splash this summer.

If you're a Denver Nuggets fan, this is an episode you won't want to miss. Chris Dempsey discusses the Altitude shakeup, Nuggets roster questions, and why Denver basketball will always be home.

videos.title: Potential Free Agent Forwards the Avalanche Could Sign
videos.summary_source_text:
Potential Free Agent Forwards the Avalanche Could Sign Colorado Avalanche eye reinforcements as NHL free agency heats up. Could Alexander Kerfoot or Vladimir Tarasenko fit the bill, or will surprise targets like Teddy Blueger and Matias Maccelli jumpstart the Avalanche’s forward depth? Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down six budget-friendly names who could fill crucial holes up front, analyze contract projections, and debate what the ideal additions might offer Colorado’s bottom six.

The stakes rise as star players across the league may be on the move. With Zach Werenski, Jason Robertson, and Connor Hellebuyck at the center of swirling trade rumors, which NHL franchise lands the next big piece? The show tackles Detroit Red Wings’ Dylan Larkin’s uncertain future, Dallas Stars’ cap headaches, and why the Florida Panthers and Edmonton Oilers could pull off blockbuster goaltender deals. Get the inside scoop on the Avalanche’s offseason priorities and how league-wide trades might reshape the NHL landscape.

videos.title: Local AI That Codes Like Claude - Ornith 1.0
videos.summary_source_text:
Local AI That Codes Like Claude - Ornith 1.0 Join the community: https://mrc.fm/cmc

A new open source model just landed that claims to match Claude Opus on the big coding benchmarks and the smallest version runs on a laptop. It's called Ornith-1.0 from DeepReinforce, and the clever bit is that it writes its own scaffolding instead of relying on a human built harness, it learns to build the orchestration that guides its own solutions. The family spans a tiny 9B all the way to a 397B frontier model, all open weights on Hugging Face. So today I'm putting it through the only test that matters... building real games and apps, live, no edits. Can local AI actually go toe to toe with the frontier labs now? Let's find out what works, what breaks, and whether you'd ever swap this in for the paid tools.

videos.title: The Broom Downswing Move Is Only Half the Answer
videos.summary_source_text:
The Broom Downswing Move Is Only Half the Answer Click link in bio for lowest price on the Bumblebee SLR3 Training Aid. Most golfers are working on lag, bowed wrists, and the broom drill — and those are great moves. But they're only half the puzzle. Without the X release, you're just dragging the club through and leaving serious power and accuracy on the table.

In this video, you'll learn why wrist lag alone won't improve your ball striking, what the X release actually is and how it pairs with your lag position, and how the Bumblebee SLR3 training aid trains both feelings — broom position AND release — in a single swing.

The Bumblebee SLR3 creates the tension needed to feel the right lag position and forces your forearms to roll correctly through impact. Hit drives with it on. Feel the difference in one session. Link in bio.

videos.summary_source_text:
DRAFT COMPLETE! Carolina Hurricanes Add 6 After 2026 NHL Draft While the Carolina Hurricanes did trade out of Round 1 on Day 1, they were busy on Saturday for Day 2 of the NHL Draft. They drafted six players to add to the organization. Who are they, and what are the overall thoughts post-draft? On the Monday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on the selections of William Håkansson, Wiggo Sörensson, and Zachary Lansard. What do the two Swedes and the Canadian winger bring to the organization? How were they in 2025-26, and where are they playing this upcoming season? Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on Michael Berchild, Ryder Fetterolf, and Zachary Jovanovski. What do the two Americans and the Canadian bring to the Hurricanes? Plus, how were they last season, and where are they playing this upcoming fall? Finally, Zach shares his thoughts on the Hurricanes' draft overall. How did the Hurricanes do when it came to the two Swedes, two Americans, and two Canadians? Plus, how will they help when it comes to positional depth overall? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Biz & The Boys Took Over Boston For The Cup - ChicletsTV

videos.summary_source_text:
Every shot from Viktor Hovland's win at the Travelers Championship | 2026 Check out every televised shot from Viktor Hovland's win at the 2026 Travelers Championship, where he carded rounds of 65-61-64-69 before heading to a Monday playoff with world No. 1 Scottie Scheffler. On the first playoff hole, Hovland sunk a 7-foot birdie putt and secured his eighth PGA TOUR win when Scheffler missed a 4-foot birdie putt.

videos.title: YOUR BRAIN MAY BE AGING FASTER THAN YOU THINK | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
YOUR BRAIN MAY BE AGING FASTER THAN YOU THINK | Dr. Mandell Is your brain aging faster than it should? Many people assume that occasional forgetfulness, mental fog, slower thinking, or difficulty concentrating are simply a normal part of getting older, but in many cases these can be early warning signs that your brain needs attention. In this video, Dr. Mandell explains seven common signs that may indicate accelerated brain aging and, more importantly, what you can do to help protect your brain naturally. You'll learn how lifestyle habits, nutrition, exercise, sleep, blood sugar control, stress management, and simple daily changes can support memory, focus, mental clarity, and long-term cognitive health. You'll also discover a few easy self-checks you can perform at home that may provide valuable insight into your brain function. The sooner you recognize these warning signs, the sooner you can take positive steps to help keep your brain healthy, sharp, and resilient for years to come. Watch until the end and share this video with family and friends—it could make a meaningful difference in someone's future health.

videos.title: Golf Swing Wave of Energy — Brick
videos.summary_source_text: Golf Swing Wave of Energy — Brick Click link in bio for lowest price on the Blue Brick. Most golfers try to keep everything rigid and “connected,” but that kills timing and leads to a chicken wing. I’ll show you how to move your forearms the right way by thinking of the swing as a wave of energy: shift weight, let the arms lag behind to build energy, shallow the club (lag and shallowing are really the same move), then release that energy from the body out through the arms and club with a snapping motion. Using the Brick, I feel the club get parallel to the stick, then I go into what I call the X release—letting the arms fold and cross over so the energy goes into the clubhead. Comment “solid” and I’ll send you my video series for free. Click link in bio for lowest price on the Blue Brick. Using the Brick, I feel the club get parallel to the stick, then I go into what I call the X release—letting the arms fold and cross over so the energy goes into the clubhead. videos.title: Grok 5: Everything You've Been Shown Is Made Up
videos.summary_source_text:
Grok 5: Everything You've Been Shown Is Made Up Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Every couple of weeks your feed screams "GROK 5 IS HERE" — six trillion parameters, a 1.5-million-token context window, basically AGI in a chat box. 
Then you go to actually use it and… there's nothing. No model card. No API. No button to press.

Here's the uncomfortable truth: as of today, Grok 5 still doesn't exist. Not 
in beta, not in limited access, not anywhere. Almost every spec you've seen 
traces back to one off-hand Elon quote and a lot of people guessing.

In this video I separate the rumor from the record:
- The ONE thing xAI has officially confirmed about Grok 5
- Why the launch date keeps quietly sliding (Q1 → Q2 → "sometime")
- The 6+ real products xAI shipped in three weeks — none of them Grok 5
- The 1.5-trillion-parameter naming trick behind the headlines
- The model you should actually be using right now instead of waiting

By the end you'll know exactly what's real, what's fan fiction, and roughly 
when the real Grok 5 might show up.

videos.title: ‘Resilient’ Russell + Resurgent Max | Austrian GP Review | F1 Nation Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
‘Resilient’ Russell + Resurgent Max | Austrian GP Review | F1 Nation Podcast Tom Clarkson is joined in the Red Bull Ring paddock by F1TV experts James Hinchcliffe and Alex Brundle to analyse the Austrian Grand Prix.

George Russell got back to winning ways for the first time since the season-opener in Australia. He retakes second place in the championship standings, reducing the gap to leader Kimi Antonelli to 40 points. How did George overcome the threat of Max Verstappen in the Red Bull? What does this win mean for his title challenge? And how impressive was his racing IQ to take pole position?

On the other side of the garage, Kimi Antonelli overcame a tricky start and brake issues to finish third. But with George taking 28 points out of his lead over the last two races, how will Kimi be feeling about his own title hopes?

Verstappen secured his best result of the season with P2, so why was he back in contention at the front and does this mean he’ll be consistently competitive going forward?

Plus, the guys discuss a frustrating race for Ferrari after winning last time out in Barcelona and whether pressure is building on McLaren having also been off the pace in Spielberg.

videos.title: You've Been Lied To About The Arms In The Golf Swing
videos.summary_source_text:
You've Been Lied To About The Arms In The Golf Swing Most golfers are trying to move their arms in a way that actually makes the golf swing harder.

Over the years, certain ideas about what the arms should do in the backswing and downswing have become incredibly common, but many of them are holding golfers back from making an efficient, powerful and repeatable swing.

In this video, I'll show you how the arms really work throughout the golf swing, from the backswing, through the transition, and into impact. You'll learn why some of the most popular swing thoughts can create problems, and what good golfers actually do instead.

We'll cover:
• The role of the arms in the backswing
• How the arms should work in the downswing
• A key move before impact that surprises most golfers
• Why improving your arm motion can transform your ball striking

If you struggle with inconsistent contact, poor strikes, lack of power or a golf swing that feels difficult to repeat, this video could completely change the way you think about the swing.

videos.title: My Top 3 GLP-1 Tips
videos.summary_source_text:
My Top 3 GLP-1 Tips lso, a fourth thing to know when you're taking GLP-1 medications:

How to manage your blood sugar.

Because GLP-1 medications may reduce appetite, but they don’t automatically teach you the habits that support long-term health. 

Understanding how different foods affect your hunger, cravings, energy, and glucose levels is a skill. And it’s a skill that stays with you even after you stop taking the medication. lso, a fourth thing to know when you're taking GLP-1 medications:

videos.title: Local AI That Codes Like Claude - Ornith 1.0
videos.summary_source_text:
Local AI That Codes Like Claude - Ornith 1.0 Join the community: https://mrc.fm/cmc

A new open source model just landed that claims to match Claude Opus on the big coding benchmarks and the smallest version runs on a laptop. It's called Ornith-1.0 from DeepReinforce, and the clever bit is that it writes its own scaffolding instead of relying on a human built harness, it learns to build the orchestration that guides its own solutions. The family spans a tiny 9B all the way to a 397B frontier model, all open weights on Hugging Face. So today I'm putting it through the only test that matters... building real games and apps, live, no edits. Can local AI actually go toe to toe with the frontier labs now? Let's find out what works, what breaks, and whether you'd ever swap this in for the paid tools. Join the community: https://mrc.fm/cmc

videos.title: Viktor Hovland takes down world No. 1 Scottie Scheffler in Monday Playoff! | Travelers | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
Viktor Hovland takes down world No. 1 Scottie Scheffler in Monday Playoff! | Travelers | 2026 Viktor Hovland secures his eighth PGA TOUR title after defeating World No. 1 Scottie Scheffler in a sudden-death Monday playoff at the 2026 Travelers Championship! 

This marks Scottie Scheffler's fourth runner-up finish in 2026.

The PGA TOUR’s final Signature Event of the 2026 season takes center stage this week at the Travelers Championship, where many of the game’s biggest stars make the short trip from Shinnecock Hills to TPC River Highlands. Fresh off his U.S. Open victory, Wyndham Clark arrives in Connecticut looking to continue a remarkable run that has included two victories in his last four starts, while fellow major contenders seek to carry their momentum into one of the TOUR’s most popular events. World No. 1 Scottie Scheffler headlines a stacked field after finishing T4 at the U.S. Open and returns to a venue where he has recorded three consecutive top-six finishes, including a playoff victory in 2024. Also in action are Cameron Young, Matt Fitzpatrick and Russell Henley, while eight of the world’s top 10 players are set to compete at TPC River Highlands. Defending champion Keegan Bradley returns looking to become the first player since 2002 to successfully defend the Travelers title. Bradley has won the event twice in the last three years, while former champions Harris English, Xander Schauffele and Jordan Spieth are also in the field. Recent form players Sam Burns and J.T. Poston arrive with plenty of confidence after strong performances during the major championship stretch, while Jason Day is expected to tee it up despite withdrawing from the U.S. Open with a back injury. With 700 FedExCup points available and the final Signature Event trophy of the season on the line, the Travelers Championship once again features one of the strongest fields of the year. Played at the fan-favorite TPC River Highlands, one of the shortest courses on the PGA TOUR schedule, the event is set for another exciting week highlighted by elite talent and plenty of summer momentum.

videos.title: Why 95% Of Amateurs Can’t Spin Their Wedges (The Truth)
videos.summary_source_text:
Why 95% Of Amateurs Can’t Spin Their Wedges (The Truth) How to spin your wedges like the pros is one of the most misunderstood parts of the short game, but today we are revealing the absolute truth. Have you ever wondered how tour players hit those amazing wedge shots that land on the green and instantly zip back like they've got the ball on a cord? If you want to learn how to spin the golf ball with complete control, you've probably been given the wrong idea about what actually creates friction and stopping power. In this video, you'll discover the real secret to increasing golf ball spin so you can stop watching your approach shots roll over the back of the green and start attacking tucked pins with confidence.

We break down the exact physics and technique required on how to generate maximum spin with wedges. It isn't about buying a magic club or swinging harder; it’s about mastering a few hidden variables that the pros use every single day.

Here is what you will learn in this masterclass:

1. The Sweet Spot Zone: Why striking the ball specifically between groove two and groove five is the ultimate cheat code for high spin.
2. The Spin Loft Formula: A simple, non-scary breakdown of how your dynamic loft and angle of attack work together to create maximum grab.
3. The 75-Round Rule: How worn-out grooves can cost you 2,000 to 3,000 RPMs of spin, and why upgrading your wedges is smarter than buying a new driver.
4. The Golf Ball Secret: Why cheap distance balls ruin your short game, and how premium urethane covers completely change your launch conditions.
5. The Step-by-Step Setup: A neat, controlled setup featuring a narrow stance, precise ball position relative to your shirt buttons, and the perfect amount of lead shaft lean.
6. The Left Foot Pressure Trigger: How a subtle pre-swing shuffle ensures a ball-then-turf strike every time, eliminating fat and thin shots.
7. The Arm-to-Chest Gap: How to avoid the "killer move" that collapses amateur impacts, using rotation to push the ball forward.
8. The Lie Game: How to accurately read the turf (bare lies vs. thick rough) so you know when the spin situation is maximized and when to rely on land angle instead.
9. Stop trying to force unnatural spin on dangerous lies. Master a consistent, predictable strike, dial in your body rotation, and let the correct setup unlock the control you've been looking for.

If you want to stop guessing your distances and finally master your wedge play from inside 100 yards, hit that subscribe button, drop a comment letting us know the last time you changed your wedges, and let’s get into the video!

0:00 - The Wedge Spin Myth vs. The Truth
1:02 - The Science of Spin: Friction & Spin Loft Explained
1:45 - Strike Location: The 2-to-5 Groove Sweet Spot
2:20 - Does Your Equipment Matter? (Wedge Wear & The 75-Round Rule)
3:02 - The Golf Ball Secret: Distance Balls vs. Urethane Covers
3:45 - Step-by-Step Wedge Setup for Maximum Control
4:51 - The Left Foot Pressure Trigger for Crisper Strikes
5:40 - Dialing in Distance Control (Arm Swing vs. Shoulder Turn)
6:25 - The Killer Pitches Move: Closing the Arm-to-Chest Gap
7:45 - The Lie Game: How to Read the Turf Before You Swing
9:00 - Why Trying to Maximize Spin is Dangerous (Play to Your Land Angle)

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

NEVER Buy These 13 Foods Organic ($$$ WASTE) You’ve probably been told that EVERYTHING should be organic… but that’s simply not true.

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/42VqLvw

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

Some foods are naturally protected from pesticides thanks to thick shells, hard outer layers, or the way they’re harvested, which means paying extra for organic versions could just be draining your wallet.

In this video, you’ll discover 13 foods that are perfectly fine to buy non-organic, including avocados, bananas, wild-caught salmon, nuts, coconuts, cabbage, and more. You’ll also learn why “organic water” might be one of the funniest marketing tricks ever.

Before you spend more money at the grocery store, watch this first.

videos.title: Generate The BEST Animations With AI
videos.summary_source_text:
Generate The BEST Animations With AI How to generate motion graphics using AI:

Step 1: Choose your AI assistant
These frameworks act as plugins or "skills" that work directly inside AI coding assistants. In the video, I used Claude Code, but they also work with VS Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex, Cowork, and more.

Step 2: Find the framework you want to use
To make this work, you'll need a programmable video framework like Remotion or Hyperframes. You can find ones like Remotion or Hyperframes (the ones I use in this video) by simply searching for them on GitHub or in a search engine. 

Step 3: Install it
You don’t need to be a developer to set this up. I literally went into the Claude Code prompt box, pasted the GitHub URL for the framework, and typed: "Install this for me, please." That is actually how easy it is.

Step 4: Write your prompt
Just describe the exact animation you want. The AI writes the underlying code and automatically renders out a clean MP4 file that you can drop directly into your video edit.

If you need professional looking graphics but don't want to spend hours keyframing in After Effects, this workflow is going to save you an enormous amount of time.

✅ SAVE this reel so you can try out this workflow next time you need it!

videos.summary_source_text:
The Moment I Realized I Figured Out My Driver Swing In this golf lesson, Eric Cogorno reveals the driver secret that helped him gain 50 yards: keeping the head back while shifting weight forward.

⏱️ Timestamps:
🔍 0:00 - Eric Cogorno: the driver secret to keeping your head back and weight forward
📐 1:36 - Why getting the upper body too far forward costs you driver distance

💡 3:29 - Comparing the swing to Tiger Woods and tour pros using the ball line

🏌️ 7:48 - The alignment stick drill for training head position behind the ball
📏 8:39 - How to build the drill from no backswing to a full swing
🔄 10:37 - Why keeping the head back alone wasn't enough to fix the slice

If you struggle with driver distance, weak fades, or hitting it too far right, this golf lesson explains the exact problem and the fix. Eric Cogorno breaks down the secret that helped him gain 50 yards off the tee in a single year: keeping the head and upper body behind the ball line while still getting the weight to the front foot. This golf swing key allows the club to deliver from low and inside, which is essential for any golfer who wants more driver distance and better contact. These golf drills also cover the natural arm rotation move that squares the club face and eliminates the weak slice that side bend alone won't fix. If you leave this video without trying the alignment stick drill, you're leaving driver distance on the table.

What You'll Learn:
• Why getting the upper body too far forward during the downswing kills driver distance
• How keeping the head behind the ball line allows the club to deliver from low and inside
• The side bend move that keeps the head back while the weight shifts forward
• Why extension, not forward bend, is key to maintaining head position
• The alignment stick drill for training proper head and weight position
• How to progress the drill from no backswing to half swings to full swings
• Why keeping the head back alone can still leave you with a weak slice
• The natural arm rotation move that squares the club face for more distance and less curve

DRAMATIC Final 9 Holes | 2026 DS Automobiles 83° Open d'Italia Watch the drama unfold in the Back 9 on Sunday, presented by Nexo as Eugenio Chacarra clinched back-to-back DP World Tour wins. 

Eugenio becomes the third player this season to clinch back-to-back DP World Tour wins following Jayden Schaper and Casey Jarvis earlier this year. This victory earns him a place in next month's 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale.

videos.title: 471. Rika har samma problem, bara med fler nollor | Lär känna Oliver Allemog
videos.summary_source_text:
471. Rika har samma problem, bara med fler nollor | Lär känna Oliver Allemog Lär känna Oliver Allemog, vår enda anställda på RikaTillsammans, snart 25 år, nybliven årets ordförande i Unga Aktiesparar och en person som gjort det mesta rätt. 

Efter drygt två år som kollega gör vi äntligen (pinsamt sent) ett riktigt lära känna-avsnitt med Oliver. Ni skickade in frågorna, och det blev ett samtal som handlar mindre om fonder och mer om det som format honom: en uppväxt med kassabok, ett studielån som gick rakt in på börsen och en ovanligt nykter syn på rika människor.

Han fick jobbet utan en enda anställningsintervju, sparade 7 500 kronor i månaden av CSN-pengarna i fondroboten Lysa och menar att de förmögna han möter har samma problem som alla andra, bara med några fler nollor. Vi pratar om allt från Berkshire Hathaways årsstämma i Omaha till varför hans första tips till en 25-åring är att njuta mer längs vägen.

Vi hoppas att du gillar avsnittet,
Jan, Caroline och Oliver

Innehållsförteckning
====
00:00:00 Introduktion till avsnittet
00:02:46 Oliver presenteras: bakgrund, ålder och var han bor
00:04:59 Lund, Unga Aktiesparare och årets ordförande
00:09:01 Förbundsstyrelsen: vision om digital satsning
00:10:47 Ekonomikillen i gänget och att sprida kunskap i familjen
00:12:43 Vägen till RT: mejlet, föreläsningen och Jan ändrade sig
00:18:05 En vanlig arbetsvecka på RT och Olivers roll
00:22:45 Livet utanför kontoret: träning, sport och familjen
00:26:50 Barndomen, drömmen om att bli bonde och uppväxten i Hörby
00:29:08 Första minnet av pengar: kassabok och veckopeng
00:33:58 Varför ekonomi handlar om psykologi, inte bara siffror
00:35:29 Att träffa förmögna: alla delar samma grundutmaningar
00:39:04 FIRE-rörelsen och att starta företag: verktyg, inte mål
00:43:08 Prestationspress, stress och att stänga av hjärnan
00:47:03 Att inte imponeras av rikedom och priset på framgång
00:51:37 Att investera hela CSN-lånet i stället för att festa bort det
00:53:08 Berkshire Hathaways årsstämma: Buffett och Munger live
00:56:37 Dyrköpt lärdom: Michelin-middagen i London och taxihistorien
01:02:02 Roligast och minst roligt med jobbet, lön och samarbete
01:07:28 Ekonomisk plan och sparkvot: mer fokus på liv än sparande
01:12:53 Portföljen i dag: Lysa, Avanza, 70/20/10 och Berkshire B
01:16:00 Tips till den som börjar spara och råd till föräldrar
01:19:04 Vad Oliver inte håller med Jan om, och utdelningar
01:22:55 Sport, Formel 1, MFF och drömmevenemang
01:25:37 Favoritböcker, sämsta finansrådet och avslutande tacktal
01:32:37 Avrundning: en ambitiös 25-åring som gjort det mesta rätt

Länkar från avsnittet:
====
- Hela avsnittet med transkribering: https://rikatillsammans.se/avsnitt/lar-kanna-oliver-allemog/
- Rikedomstrappan: 6 nivåer av rikedom: https://rikatillsammans.se/spara-och-investera/rikedomstrappan/
- Fondroboten Lysa: https://rikatillsammans.se/spara-och-investera/lysa/
- Die with Zero av Bill Perkins: https://rikatillsammans.se/studier/die-with-zero-av-bill-perkins/
- Ekonomisk frihet och FIRE: https://rikatillsammans.se/ett-rikare-liv/ekonomisk-frihet-och-fire/
- Hjälp, jag har råd men vågar inte spendera (med Moa Diseborn) — https://rikatillsammans.se/avsnitt/448-hjalp-jag-har-rad-men-vagar-inte-spendera-med-moa-diseborn/
- Tips för att förhandla bolåneräntan — https://rikatillsammans.se/vardagsekonomi/boende-bolan-och-boendeekonomi/tips-for-att-forhanla-bolaneranta/

videos.title: Avalanche Fill Prospect Pool With Nine Draft Picks & Send Ivan Ivan To Boston
videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche Fill Prospect Pool With Nine Draft Picks & Send Ivan Ivan To Boston Colorado Avalanche shake up their prospect pool with nine NHL Draft picks and a bold Ivan Ivan-for-Fabian Lysell trade. Could this infusion of young talent and strategic player moves fuel a new wave of success in Denver?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down the Avalanche’s top draft selections, spotlighting high-upside prospects like Egor Shilov and Axel Elofsson while debating the risks and rewards of picking offensive-minded defensemen and oversized goaltenders. The hosts analyze Lysell’s fit in Colorado’s system, the impact of losing Ivan Ivan, and whether new additions can thrive where others haven’t. Key topics include the Avalanche’s evolving drafting philosophy, potential lineup shifts, and the fallout from Jack Drury’s move to the Nashville Predators.

Will these risky draft bets and bold trades pay off, or are the Avs gambling too much on potential over proven results?

Anthropic Just Confirmed It: The 2028 AI Warning Is Real Self-improving AI is starting to look real. Anthropic’s Jack Clark put a 2028 timeline on recursive self-improvement, Google DeepMind says leading labs are focused on it, MirrorCode shows AI rebuilding real software alone, and OpenAI’s GPT-5.6 Sol exposed a new problem in AI safety testing.

This is bigger than another AI benchmark. The real shift is that AI is starting to help build the next AI. If that loop keeps tightening, the race stops being only about better chatbots and becomes about who controls the systems that improve themselves.

videos.title: The Vagus Nerve's Role at Mealtime
videos.summary_source_text:
The Vagus Nerve's Role at Mealtime We spend so much time talking about what to eat that we forget to talk about how we eat. If you're stressed, distracted, or rushing through a meal, your nervous system is focused on survival instead of digestion. I always encourage people to eat in a calm, relaxed state because that's when the parasympathetic nervous system can do its job.

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

All of my social media and official links: https://linktr.ee/pradipjamnadasmd

Subscribe to the Channel! https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOtQHehGWtblMp1gZC8Kq3Q?sub_confirmation=1

Remember that my videos are not a substitute for individualized medical care by a qualified physician. Always consult your physicians before making any diet, nutrition, medication, or lifestyle changes.


About Dr. Pradip Jamnadas, MD, MBBS, FACC, FSCAI, FCCP, FACP

The founder and Chief Medical Officer of Cardiovascular Interventions, P.A. in Orlando Florida where, since 1990,  he has been repeatedly recognized in local publications as a Top Doctor performing thousands of interventional procedures in hospital and out patient settings. As a consultant cardiologist with a large diversified inpatient and outpatient practice he is noted for his passions for teaching and illuminating prevention for cardiovascular disease . He is also a clinical assistant professor of medicine at The Florida State University and University of Central Florida. We spend so much time talking about what to eat that we forget to talk about how we eat. In this video, Dr. Alan Mandell explains the science behind one of the simplest and healthiest habits you can add to your daily routine. Learn how cucumbers support hydration, healthy digestion, weight management, healthier skin, immune function, heart health, normal blood pressure, and overall wellness through their high water content, fiber, vitamins, minerals, and antioxidant compounds. You'll also discover the best way to eat cucumbers, whether you should leave the peel on, the best time of day to eat them, and why consistency is the real key to lasting health. videos.title: Your Set Up Is Not One Size Fits All  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Your Set Up Is Not One Size Fits All  #golfswing #golftips Your driver and iron setups should look very different if you want consistent contact. With driver, you’ll see more hip tilt, weight favoring the trail side, and the ball positioned farther forward to help you hit up on it. With irons, the hips are more level, the ball is closer to the middle of the stance, and the weight favors the lead side to promote compression. Using an alignment stick through the belt loops gives a clear visual of your hip tilt and setup differences.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. Your driver and iron setups should look very different if you want consistent contact. With driver, you’ll see more hip tilt, weight favoring the trail side, and the ball positioned farther forward to help you hit up on it. videos.title: Load Right Without Moving Your Hips
videos.summary_source_text: Load Right Without Moving Your Hips Click link in bio for lowest price on the Blue Brick. If you’ve been struggling with swaying, it’s not your fault—most golfers are told to “load on the right side,” but they interpret that as sliding the hips, which creates reverse spine tilt, puts you out of position, and leaves you hanging back as you rotate into impact. Instead of moving your hips to the right, focus on rotating your upper body so you load into the right side while staying centered (like keeping a stick right between your legs). This keeps you in a great position to rotate down and explode through impact. If you want to master your weight shift and start using your lower body like the pros, grab a Ball First board and start hitting flush shots. Click link in bio for lowest price on the Blue Brick. videos.title: OpenAI Lost $21 Billion in 3 Months — Here's What the Headlines Missed
videos.summary_source_text:
OpenAI Lost $21 Billion in 3 Months — Here's What the Headlines Missed Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Everyone's seen the "OpenAI is collapsing" headline. Almost nobody's read past it. So I pulled the actual shareholder documents and filings — and the real financial picture isn't a company on the verge of shutting down. It's something stranger, and a lot more interesting.

In this breakdown: where that $21 billion loss actually came from (and why most of it never left the bank), the real cash burn, where $3.7 billion a quarter is going, the circular financing loop between Microsoft, Nvidia, and OpenAI, the Anthropic revenue crossover nobody's talking about, and whether "shutting down" is a real risk or just clickbait in a business suit.

If you want the follow-up the moment that IPO filing goes public, subscribe — I track these as the numbers drop.

6:34 So Will OpenAI Actually Shut Down?

videos.title: The OpenAI × Jony Ive Device Everything We Actually Know
videos.summary_source_text:
The OpenAI × Jony Ive Device Everything We Actually Know Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Everyone's got a "leaked render" of OpenAI's mystery device. Almost none of them can prove a word of it. So we went through OpenAI's own court filings, job postings, and on-record quotes from Altman and Ive to separate what's actually confirmed from what a supply-chain analyst guessed on Twitter — and the real story points somewhere nobody's talking about.

In this breakdown: the $6.5B io merger, the timeline OpenAI's own lawyers put on the record (hint: it's later than Altman implied), why it's screenless and voice-first, what the job listings quietly reveal about mass production, and exactly where the confirmed facts end and the rumor mill takes over.

If you want AI coverage that separates fact from noise instead of chasing the most clickable leak, subscribe — we're tracking this one until OpenAI confirms something real.

videos.title: I'm 51 Now. Here's My Biggest Muscle Building Mistakes I've Made!
videos.summary_source_text:
I'm 51 Now. Here's My Biggest Muscle Building Mistakes I've Made! Get a program to match your goals - https://tinyurl.com/5n6cwdck

If I could go back 30 years and show my younger self one video on how to build muscle, this would be it. After decades of lifting, coaching, physical therapy, and training pro athletes, these are the 16 muscle building mistakes I wish I had fixed sooner.

These mistakes cost me gains, beat up my joints, and made building muscle harder than it needed to be. Some happened in the gym. Some happened in the kitchen. Some came from copying the wrong workouts, eating foods I thought were healthy, ignoring pain, skipping correctives, and misunderstanding hypertrophy.

The first mistake was believing that copying a pro bodybuilder’s workout would make me look like a pro bodybuilder. As a kid, I saw magazine routines with 36 to 40 sets for chest and thought that was the answer. More volume is not always better. At some point, it becomes junk volume. If your goal is muscle growth, you need productive hard sets, progressive overload, recovery, and exercises that fit your body.

Nutrition mistakes were just as big. I thought flavored instant oatmeal was a healthy bodybuilding breakfast, not realizing that two servings were loading me up with nearly as much sugar as a can of soda. I also made the mistake of being too rigid with my diet, thinking one imperfect meal would ruin my physique. Over time, I learned that consistency beats obsession. The best muscle building diet gives you enough protein, quality calories, structure, and flexibility to stick with it.

I also underestimated corrective exercises. As a physical therapist, I learned that correctives are not “little exercises” you do only when you have time. They plug the leaks that allow the bigger lifts to work better. External rotations, face pulls, posture work, and upper back training can improve shoulder position, chest recruitment, pressing strength, aesthetics, and joint health.

Chest training was another major lesson. If you shrug during every bench press, dip, crossover, or pressing movement, your shoulders can dominate what your chest should be doing. Learning to “un-shrug” before the rep helps put the chest in position to be the prime mover.

Another huge muscle building lesson is learning to seek out contraction. Too many people just move weights from point A to point B. If you want to build muscle, you have to learn to contract the target muscle through space. That discomfort, burn, or almost cramping feeling can be the sign that you are finally connecting with the muscle you are trying to grow.

Hydration was one of my most overlooked mistakes. For years I used thirst as my only guide. Muscle is mostly water, and chronic dehydration is not the best environment for strength, performance, recovery, or muscle growth. I also learned not to ignore a sweet tooth. Trying to eliminate every food you enjoy usually backfires.

One of the most common hypertrophy mistakes is forgetting the eccentric, especially on pulling exercises. On curls, rows, pulldowns, and pullups, the weight falls away from you, so people get lazy with the negative. Slowing down the eccentric creates one of the major muscle building stimuli you are missing if every rep is rushed.

Progressive overload also applies to bodyweight training. Endless pushups, dips, or pullups are not always the answer. Sometimes you need a harder variation, added weight, shorter rest, better tempo, or a more challenging angle. Calisthenics are still resistance training. If you never increase the challenge, you stop forcing new adaptation.

Meal preparation is another key. If you do not prepare, you prepare to fail. Having protein, carbs, and meals ready makes it easier to stay consistent when life gets busy. I also misunderstood sports drinks. I thought I needed Gatorade because athletes drank it, but most lifting workouts do not require a sugar-loaded electrolyte drink.

The face pull is one of the best exercises for the upper back, rear delts, rotator cuff, posture, shoulder health, and better pressing mechanics. It is not just a corrective. It is a muscle building exercise most lifters need more of.

Two of the biggest mistakes were training through pain and ignoring my own body’s limitations. There is a major difference between training through an injury and training around an injury. Working around pain allows you to keep building muscle without continuing to inflame the same tissues. Swap the exercise, change the range of motion, adjust the variation, and keep training the muscle without aggravating the joint.

Finally, never forget the power of time. Sets, reps, exercises, and weight matter, but so does how long the workout takes, how long you rest, and how much work you can do in a focused window. Time can be the great equalizer in building muscle.

For complete step-by-step training programs that help you build muscle without the guesswork, visit the link above. Get a program to match your goals - https://tinyurl.com/5n6cwdck

videos.title: Could This Putter Be Better Than L.A.B?
videos.summary_source_text:
Could This Putter Be Better Than L.A.B? Can a brand you've probably never heard of outperform some of the biggest names in golf? Rick Shiels puts the new Performance Golf RS1 Putter to the test to find out. With bold technology and some big claims, does it genuinely help you hole more putts, or is it just clever marketing? Watch as Rick tests it on the course and on the putting green to see if the RS1 lives up to the hype.

Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: Jag ställer ALLA frågor till en Kina-bilrobot!
videos.summary_source_text:
Jag ställer ALLA frågor till en Kina-bilrobot! Här kommer min första personliga intervju med en Robot!

Cherys bilrobot Mornine är till salu – och hon vet väldigt mycket. Som hur tysk bilindustri bäst borde möta den Kinesiska, varför Kinesiska bilar är billigare än tyska - även om båda utvecklats och tillverkas i kina, vilka Cherys största utmaningar är i Sverige, hur AI påverkar bilutvecklingen, när man kommer tjäna pengar i Sverige, vilka Cherys och VW:s styrkor och svagheter är. 
Och så vidare.

Men hon har också lite koll på vad lycka är, hur bilarbetarna mår och varför födelsetalen är låga. Men när demokrati kommer på tal blir hon mycket tyst och i slutet av intervjun blir hon riktigt trött på mig och mina frågor, och knuffas och använder olika tekniker för att får slut på det hela.
