videos.title: Stop Dragging the Club Inside
videos.summary_source_text: Stop Dragging the Club Inside Click link in bio for lowest price on the Blue Brick. If you drag the club inside on the takeaway, you’re probably setting yourself up to reroute it over the top. Here’s my simple Blue Brick + alignment stick drill to shallow the club and strike it solid: place an alignment stick down your grip so it sticks out a couple feet, then set the vertical wedge launch angle stick straight up and down on your toe line. Stand about 5–6 inches from the brick, let the club slide down your left leg, and make the takeaway with hands in and clubhead out (clubhead stays slightly outside your hands, barely missing the stick). On the shift, get the butt-end stick outside the vertical stick to shallow, then clear your body and hit it on the downswing—hands feel passive, body leads. Do 5 reps a day. videos.title: This Wrist Move is Causing Your Slice! #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
This Wrist Move is Causing Your Slice! #golfswing #golftips If your left wrist is too cupped at the top, the clubface will be open and you’ll need several compensations just to get the ball back on line. That usually leads to slices, weak contact, or a big loss of distance. In this video we show you how to feel the clubface more “up to the sky” or facing up to overcorrect the pattern and find a stronger, more square position at the top. With the wrist in a better place, your downswing becomes simpler and your strike becomes much more consistent.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. videos.title: Get Rid of a Sore Throat in 2 Minutes (Naturally)
videos.summary_source_text:
Get Rid of a Sore Throat in 2 Minutes (Naturally) How do you get rid of a sore throat in 1–2 minutes without pills, herbs, or medication? This acupressure technique focuses on applying pressure to the back of the neck directly opposite the location of the sore throat.

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/4whXFmI

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

The technique is simple:
• Find the location of the sore throat in the front of the neck
• Locate the matching point on the back of the neck
• Apply firm pressure for 1–2 minutes

This technique is designed to improve circulation, lymphatic flow, and nerve flow to help relieve a sore throat and keep it from coming back.

#sorethroat #acupressure #sorethroatremedy #naturalremedy #throatpain #healthtips #wellness #lymphaticdrainage #winterhealth #home remedies

videos.title: Why McDavid's Ankles Collapse on Purpose (And Why That's Making Him Faster)
videos.summary_source_text:
Why McDavid's Ankles Collapse on Purpose (And Why That's Making Him Faster) Why McDavid's Ankles Collapse on Purpose (And Why That's Making Him Faster)

There are well-meaning, well-educated coaches in 2026 still teaching kids to skate with "triple extension" and perfectly stacked joints. The problem is that's not how any elite athlete in any speed-and-power sport actually moves. Watch McDavid skate. Watch Sinner serve. Watch elite sprinters strike the ground. They all collapse into positions traditional coaching tells you to avoid, and they get faster because of it.

In this video I break down the kinesiology of why looseness beats locked, why ankle collapse and valgus knee alignment are features (not flaws) of elite movement, and the brain-bandwidth reason loose players also tend to have better hockey sense. Watch the full breakdown to see why your joints don't need to be stacked to be safe, fast, or correct.

👉 Drills, breakdowns, progressions, and full mechanics playbook (100's of videos) all available in Train 2.0+ here: https://app.train2point0.com/bundles/membership-plus

About Train 2.0: Train 2.0 is an online hockey development platform founded by Jason Yee: kinesiologist, former professional player, and UBC honors graduate. We give players and coaches a mechanical advantage by reverse-engineering elite NHL movements and making them available to players at every level.

_______________

👉 Start your Train 2.0 Free Training and learn the Downhill Skating System pillars here: https://train2point0.thinkific.com/courses/free-training

🌐 Visit us on home ice at our website for more details about Train 2.0 Hockey https://www.train2point0.com/

👉 Check out the Train 2.0+ Coaches Certification and book a free discovery call here: https://train2point0.com/coaches/#

📧 Want free content, trends, and breakdowns we don't post anywhere else? Join the Train 2.0 Weekly Report and get elite skating, skill development, and performance insights delivered straight to your inbox every week.: https://train2point0.beehiiv.com/

🔔 Subscribe and turn on Notifications Bell for weekly hockey skill presentations + drills: https://www.youtube.com/@Train2point0

_______________

A note for coaches: the ACL injury concern around valgus knee alignment is real and worth understanding, but the answer isn't to teach players to lock their knees rigidly. The answer is to build the ankle, hip, and posterior chain strength to control those positions under load, which is exactly how elite athletes get away with using them. Avoiding valgus entirely is like avoiding a bird's wings because they look fragile. Watch what they actually do, then build the support structure for it.

_______________

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/train2point0/?hl=en
Twitter: https://twitter.com/train2point0
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/train2point0/

videos.title: I Bought a Car at Auction IN Japan!
videos.summary_source_text:
I Bought a Car at Auction IN Japan! Get 20% off CarVertical: https://www.carvertical.com/gb/landing/v3?a=watson&b=38b26e3a&voucher=watson&utm_medium=infl

I flew to Japan with one mission — find a car worth importing — and I had no idea which one I'd be coming home with. In this episode I head to Gulliver, Japan's biggest used car dealer, then take on the USS auctions in Tokyo to try and land something I can actually sell back in the UK.

From kei cars and Alphard VIP minivans to a Civic Type R and the Land Cruiser 250 you can barely get hold of in Britain, I go hunting for the right car at the right price — and find out the hard way that the perfect one on paper can fall apart the second you put a paint-depth gauge on it. Three cars, three problems, and one very stressful auction.

If you've ever thought about importing a car from Japan yourself, this is the real version — the prices, the shipping, roll-on-roll-off vs container, and everything that goes wrong in between.
The car's going up for sale on japanesedreammachines.co.uk and listed on Car Wow. Subscribe to follow the rest of the build-up of the business. Get 20% off CarVertical: https://www.carvertical.com/gb/landing/v3?a=watson&b=38b26e3a&voucher=watson&utm_medium=infl

► Hello guys and welcome back! Today we're recapping the BIGGEST steals of the 2026 NHL Draft class, going through the HIGHEST value picks from Rounds 1-7!

The Best Exercise to Hack the Vagus Nerve I don't think about exercise as just burning calories or building strength. I think about it as an opportunity to train the nervous system. Short bursts of intense activity followed by complete rest help the body transition from sympathetic activation into parasympathetic recovery, making it one of my favorite ways to hack the vagus nerve.

videos.title: Don’t Do Big Toe Drags, Do Kane Drags Instead
videos.summary_source_text:
Don’t Do Big Toe Drags, Do Kane Drags Instead The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: Cure your shanks with this drill
videos.summary_source_text: Cure your shanks with this drill Click link in bio for lowest price on the Blue Brick. Shanks can feel contagious, but they’re usually just contact off the hosel from striking too far on the inside of the club. I show a simple drill using a brick and an alignment stick: set the ball close to the stick so a hosel strike taps it, then make 4–5 practice swings avoiding the stick and recreate that feel (like you’re hitting more off the toe). I also explain how weight moving toward your toes makes you stand up and push the hosel into the ball, while feeling pressure toward your heels helps you stay in posture and keep your hips from moving toward the ball. After fixing shanks, I turn the sticks sideways to ingrain an inside swing, straighten the path, and hit more center-face shots with a straighter ball flight. videos.title: Fix Your Impact Position  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Fix Your Impact Position  #golfswing #golftips Many golfers think they should return the club to the ball the same way they set up — but impact is a completely different position. At impact the hands should be slightly ahead, the hips more open, and the weight shifted into the lead side. In this video, we show you how to build and feel the correct impact position before you swing, then add a small backswing to train that movement into your strike. This simple drill will help you create better compression and more consistent contact.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. Many golfers think they should return the club to the ball the same way they set up — but impact is a completely different position. videos.title: The #1 Cause of Hair Loss (& How to Fix It)
videos.summary_source_text:
The #1 Cause of Hair Loss (& How to Fix It) The number one factor in hair loss isn’t dead hair follicles. It’s scar tissue. Even in someone who is completely bald, the stem cells responsible for growing hair are still alive. They’re just dormant.

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/3QrGb7V

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

The problem:
• Scar tissue
• Inflammation
• Calcification
• Reduced blood flow to the follicle

The solution:
• Low-carb or ketogenic diet
• Microneedling
• Topical melatonin

Microneedling helps break down the scar tissue around the follicles and opens the door for a day or two. That’s when you apply topical melatonin to help stimulate the area before bed.

#hairloss #hairgrowth #hairregrowth #microneedling #melatonin #ketogenicdiet #alopecia #thinninghair #healthtips #wellness

videos.title: Why Your Practice Swing Looks Good... But Your Real Swing Doesn’t
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Your Practice Swing Looks Good... But Your Real Swing Doesn’t ⛳️ Take Your FREE Game Assessment → https://meandmygolf.com/game-plan/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=25.06.26

📱 Download the Swing Coach App (2-Week Free Trial) → https://go.meandmygolf.com/swingcoach/yt/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=25.06.26

Why does your practice swing look good, but your real swing doesn’t?

In this video, we break down one of the biggest reasons golfers struggle with inconsistency, poor strikes, and over-the-top swings... the club face through impact.

So many golfers can make a practice swing that looks balanced, on plane, and athletic. But once a ball is there, everything changes. The club face is often wide open, the body reacts to it, and the swing you thought you had suddenly disappears.

We’ll show you exactly what to look for in slow motion, how to check this in your own swing, and a couple of simple drills to help you build better club face awareness and more reliable impact.

If your swing feels different from shot to shot, this could be the first thing to check.

videos.title: Google Spark: The $100/Month AI Agent vs the 4.9x Data Engine
videos.summary_source_text:
Google Spark: The $100/Month AI Agent vs the 4.9x Data Engine Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
You've probably seen "Google Spark" in your feed — and walked away more confused than when you started. That's not your fault. Google shipped two completely unrelated products, for two different audiences, under the same name, in the same month.

In this breakdown I separate what's actually confirmed from what's just marketing: Gemini Spark, the always-on AI agent inside the Gemini app, and the Managed Service for Apache Spark, Google Cloud's big-data rebrand of Dataproc. One does your errands while you sleep. The other runs terabyte-scale data jobs. They share nothing but a name — and a habit of burying the important stuff in the fine print.

I go through Google's own product docs, the I/O and Cloud Next announcements, and the early hands-on coverage to figure out where the bold claims hold up and where they quietly oversell. The 4.9x speed number? Vendor benchmark. The "24/7 agent that does everything"? Boxed in harder than the demo suggests. We get into all of it.

If you want every model and product drop covered with the hype filtered out, subscribe — that's the whole point of this channel.

⏱️ CHAPTERS
00:00 Intro — Why Google Spark Is So Confusing
01:17 Two Products, One Name
02:13 Gemini Spark — What It Actually Does
03:54 The Catch — Pricing, Privacy, and Where It Breaks
05:28 Where Spark Sits Against the Competition
06:45 Switching Gears
07:04 Managed Service for Apache Spark — The Big-Data Rebrand
08:43 Pricing, Security, and the Parts Nobody Highlights in the Keynote
10:21 Where It Lands Against Databricks and AWS
11:29 What This Actually Means for You

Which Spark are you actually here for? Drop it in the comments — I suspect most of you care about one and have never heard of the other.

videos.title: Fix Your Backswing Weight Shift for Ball-First Contact
videos.summary_source_text: Fix Your Backswing Weight Shift for Ball-First Contact Click link in bio for lowest price on the Blue Brick. If you keep falling back onto your trail foot and can’t “get left,” it’s not your downswing—it’s where your weight is at the top of your backswing. When you load too much onto your lead foot early, you can’t push from the right side, so you just rotate, cast the club, and create bad contact (topped, thin, fat). I want you to start by getting right: load into the right side like a pitcher, keep an athletic amount of knee bend so you can push forward, then shift your hips and upper body left from the top so your low point stays where it should. Do that and you’ll finally stop falling back and start flushing ball-first contact. #golf #golfswing #weightshift #ballfirst #ironplay #golfdrills #swingtips #golftraining Click link in bio for lowest price on the Blue Brick. videos.title: 🔴 LIVE | The Women's Amateur Championship Golf | Final
videos.summary_source_text:
🔴 LIVE | The Women's Amateur Championship Golf | Final SUBSCRIBE -  https://bit.ly/RandaGolfSubscribe

The championship, founded in 1893, attracts an international field with an impressive list of former winners including McCormack Medal winner Leona Maguire and major champions Georgia Hall and Anna Nordqvist.

This year's Women's Amateur Championship will take place at Muirfield in Scotland from 22-27 June. Muirfield hosted the AIG Women's Open in 2022 and is regarded as one of the best links courses in the world.

Paula Martin Sampedro claimed victory in The 122nd Women's Amateur Championship at Nairn in June 2025, the Spaniard edged out the USA's Farah O'Keefe 2&1 in a fabulous 36-hole final that saw both players excel.

videos.title: GPT-5.6 Explained: 3 Models: 91.9% Benchmark, 750 Tokens/Sec, $30 Per 1K
videos.summary_source_text:
GPT-5.6 Explained: 3 Models: 91.9% Benchmark, 750 Tokens/Sec, $30 Per 1K Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
GPT-5.6 just launched — and almost nobody can actually use it. OpenAI shipped it to roughly twenty vetted partners after letting the U.S. government preview it first, and the real story isn't the 91.9% benchmark headline. It's that GPT-5.6 is secretly three models — Sol, Terra, and Luna — and that this one shipped under government review at all.

I read the system cards so you don't have to. In this breakdown I separate which of OpenAI's benchmark claims hold up from the ones that deserve an asterisk: the 91.9% Terminal-Bench score that only Sol's multi-agent Ultra mode hit, the 750 tokens-per-second Cerebras claim, the $30-per-1K-output flagship pricing, and the quiet detail where the "cheaper, dumber" Luna actually outscored the "balanced" Terra. Every impressive number here came from OpenAI's own charts — so we treat them as the vendor's best case until independent benchmarks land.

We get into the tiers and when each one actually pays for itself, the new Max and Ultra reasoning knobs, the GeneBench efficiency claim, the cybersecurity capabilities that triggered the government review, the safety stack, and a practical migration plan if you're on GPT-5.x today.
Drop a comment: would you pay the Sol premium, or does Terra cover most of what you do?

Simple Lead Side Bend Drill for a Better Backswing #shorts #golfswing  #golf #golfer #ericcogorno #shorts 

In this golf lesson, Eric Cogorno and JT Thomas show how shoulder and hip motion in the backswing fixes your downswing.

If you're fighting your downswing, the real fix is probably in your backswing. Eric Cogorno and JT Thomas break down how to combine the correct shoulder turn with the correct hip rotation during the backswing to set up an easy, repeatable downswing. Once you get your hips moving correctly, the feeling is simple: they should never stop going. These golf drills give you simple feels and checkpoints so you stop fighting compensations on the way down and start fixing the cause. If you leave this video without trying the left side bend drill, you're leaving consistency on the table.

What You'll Learn:
• Why most downswing problems are actually caused by a flawed backswing
• The correct lead shoulder position: down and in toward the midline of the body
• The left side bend drill and how to feel it without using your hips
• Why a flat shoulder turn forces a steep, crashing downswing
• How the trail hip should rotate up and toward the target during the backswing
• The fist-width checkpoint for proper hip rotation
• Why your hips should never stop moving forward once they start
• The long lead shoulder drill for checking your backswing position at home

#backswing #downswing #golfswing #shoulderturn #hiprotation #golftips #golflessons #golfdrills #howtoplaygolf #ericcogorno

videos.summary_source_text:
DRINK 1 CUP at Night to Shrink Your Waist If you’re struggling with stubborn belly fat, your problem may not be calories; it may be cortisol.

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/3RtLDaN

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

When your stress hormone stays elevated at night, your body becomes more likely to store fat around your midsection. The worse your sleep gets, the harder it becomes for your body to burn visceral fat.

In this video, you’ll learn why drinking one cup of lemon balm tea before bed may help you calm your nervous system, improve deep sleep, lower nighttime cortisol, and support a smaller waistline naturally.

videos.title: Cover the Lead Side Like This  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Cover the Lead Side Like This  #golfswing #golftips To compress the ball well, your body needs to be preparing for impact earlier than most golfers realize. By allowing the lead shoulder to cover the lead leg and moving cohesively—shifting and turning together—you arrive at the impact line sooner and with more control. Using an alignment stick against the lead hip gives a clear visual of where impact should be and how early you can get there. This creates a smoother transition and much more consistent contact.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. To compress the ball well, your body needs to be preparing for impact earlier than most golfers realize. videos.title: Why 95% Of Amateurs Improve With This Move
videos.summary_source_text:
Why 95% Of Amateurs Improve With This Move Most amateur golfers are trying to improve their ball striking by turning more — but that could be exactly why they struggle to strike their irons and hybrids consistently.

In this golf lesson, Danny Maude reveals the simple “double pendulum” image that helped one of his students, Ian, improve his iron strike, hit hybrids better off the deck, create more distance and make his golf swing feel much more effortless.

Danny Maude is one of the world’s most-watched online golf coaches, helping golfers improve their golf swing, strike their irons better, hit driver straighter, create more effortless power and enjoy the game more with simple, practical golf lessons.

Danny explains:
◼ Why many amateur golfers turn too much and lose the natural swinging motion in the golf swing
◼ The simple double pendulum image that can improve your ball striking with irons and hybrids
◼ Why great ball strikers create effortless power without trying to hit the ball harder
◼ How your hips and spine can support the golf club without swaying off the ball
◼ Why this move helps you hit the ball first and control the low point of your golf swing
◼ The simple arm movement that helps you strike irons, hybrids and even driver more consistently

If you struggle to strike your irons pure, hit hybrids off the deck, create consistent contact or generate effortless power in your golf swing, this simple image could really help.

The key is not to force the club or try to control every position.

Instead, you’ll learn how to let the golf club swing freely while your body supports that swinging motion naturally — just like the best ball strikers do.

00:00 Why Ian Was Struggling With Strike And Distance
01:09 Why Great Ball Strikers Make Power Look Effortless
01:27 The Simple Double Pendulum Image
02:40 Why Amateur Golfers Turn Too Much
03:19 How To Move Without Swaying In The Golf Swing
04:44 Start Small To Improve Your Strike
05:34 The Second Ingredient For Better Ball Striking
06:46 The Arm Move That Helps You Strike Irons Better
07:35 How To Build Effortless Power
08:25 How Great Players Support The Golf Club
08:42 Why This Works For So Many Amateur Golfers

🎁 FREE PRACTICE GUIDE
Everything I show you in this golf lesson is included in a free downloadable practice guide you can access here: https://www.dannymaude.com/you-cant-strike-your-irons-because-you-keep-doing-this

If you would like more personalised help from me, consider joining my community here on dannymaude.com.

If you enjoyed this golf lesson, please give it a thumbs up, subscribe to the channel, and share it with a golfing friend who would love to improve their ball striking, strike irons better and create more effortless power.

Have a wonderful golfing week.

Your coach,
Danny

WATCH NEXT:
If you’re struggling with your driver and want to hit it straighter, watch this lesson next:
https://youtu.be/pGU1H5mXm98

videos.title: FAST Relief for Knee Pain & Inflammation (2-Minute Fix!)
videos.summary_source_text:
FAST Relief for Knee Pain & Inflammation (2-Minute Fix!) Do you wake up with knee pain and knee stiffness every morning? Discover the hidden cause of morning knee pain, simple knee pain exercises you can do in bed, and natural ways to support healthy knee joints. 

0:00 Morning knee stiffness relief 
0:20 Knee inflammation explained 
2:24 Knee pain exercises 
4:05 Arthritis in the knee joints
5:35 How to stop knee pain
5:46 Turmeric for arthritis
6:14 Vitamin D for healthy knee joints 
7:27 Diet and knee pain
9:11 Quad strength and knee pain
9:27 Sit-to-stand exercises
10:17 Backward walking for knee pain
11:11 Knee pain relief tips 

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/4oPUhNf

Keep watching for more knee pain relief tips and ways to support healthy joints:
▶️ https://youtu.be/voSJj_tX8ZA
▶️ https://youtu.be/CD2vs-Ud6bo
▶️ https://youtu.be/6GHvlqUD46c

Discover how this collagen-rich food can help rebuild cartilage:
▶️ https://youtu.be/SHvL0_jvYGs 

Check out this article to learn the best vitamins for arthritis: https://drbrg.co/4g9wB4g

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Morning knee pain doesn’t actually start in the morning. It often begins in the middle of the night, leading to knee pain and knee stiffness that can last 30–60 minutes after you wake up. Knee inflammation may also interfere with deep, restful sleep.

If you have knee pain in the morning, try these simple knee pain exercises before getting out of bed:
1. Ankle pumps
2. Heel slides
3. Quad sets

Research has found that microbes from dental infections may travel through the bloodstream and have been associated with inflammation in the arteries and joints, making oral health an important part of overall joint health.

In addition to knee pain exercises, focus on supporting a healthy inflammatory response. Turmeric and vitamin D may help support healthy knee joints. For best results, take vitamin D with its cofactors: vitamin K2 and magnesium.

Supporting healthy insulin levels may also help promote a healthy inflammatory response. 

Improving quadriceps strength is one of the best ways to support healthy knees. Sit-to-stand exercises are a simple way to strengthen the quadriceps and hamstrings while improving knee stability and function.

DATA:
https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC3888235/

https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S2405844025008436 
https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC6413222/

videos.title: The BEST golf shop EVER...🤯⛳️
videos.summary_source_text:
The BEST golf shop EVER...🤯⛳️ Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: New 911 Turbo S vs Ferrari 296: DRAG RACE
videos.summary_source_text:
New 911 Turbo S vs Ferrari 296: DRAG RACE We’re drag racing the all-new Porsche 911 Turbo S against a Ferrari 296 GTB over the 1/4-mile and 1/2-mile. We’ll also compare the two in a 100mph brake test.

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-27-06

It’s a Germany vs Italy drag race!

We’ve got Mat in the all-new Porsche 911 Turbo S, and he’s lining up against Sam in the Ferrari 296 GTB!

The question is, can this all-new Turbo S follow in the footsteps of its predecessor and become the new king of the Carwow drag strip? Let’s take a look at the stats…

Starting with the Porsche, it’s powered by a 3.6-litre twin-turbo flat-six hybrid, and this puts down 711hp and 800Nm. This power is sent to all four wheels, and it weighs in at 1,740kg.

As for the 296, it’s powered by a 3-litre twin-turbo V6 coupled with an electric motor. The two combine to produce 830hp and 740Nm, with this power sent to the rear wheels only! It weighs in at 1,558kg, and as new, it costs £259,575.

So the Ferrari may have more power and be lighter, but it’s only rear wheel drive! Will that prove decisive in the race? There’s only one way to find out… LET’S RACE! We’re drag racing the all-new Porsche 911 Turbo S against a Ferrari 296 GTB over the 1/4-mile and 1/2-mile. We’ll also compare the two in a 100mph brake test.

videos.title: Hindi - 26.06.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi - 26.06.26 - RIFT Presentation RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

RIFT is built around a simple vision: making modern trading technology more accessible while helping users participate in financial markets through a combination of automation, education, and innovative infrastructure. videos.title: Why You Hit Fat or Thin Shots #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Why You Hit Fat or Thin Shots #golfswing #golftips If your irons are flying high, fat, or thin — your low point is probably before the ball.
This happens when your head sways off the ball instead of staying centered and loaded.
Feel like your head leans slightly toward the target in your backswing — even though it won’t actually move there — to stay centered and compress it like a pro.
Comment “PURE” if you want us to show you exactly why this happens in your swing.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. If your irons are flying high, fat, or thin — your low point is probably before the ball.

videos.title: Simple Stick Drill for Ball-First Contact
videos.summary_source_text: Simple Stick Drill for Ball-First Contact Click link in bio for lowest price on the Blue Brick. If you’ve been struggling to get rid of sway, it’s not your fault—most golfers just don’t know how much to move their hips. I show a simple drill using a stick to give instant feedback: if your knee and hips shift too far to the right on the backswing, you’ll hit the stick and end up stuck on your back foot, leading to tops, chunks, and poor contact. When you avoid the stick, you still load pressure into the trail side without drifting back, letting you explode into impact and get onto the lead side for clean, ball-first contact. If you want the immediate feedback to train your hip movement like the pros, check out the Ball First Board via the link in my bio. Click link in bio for lowest price on the Blue Brick. videos.title: Try This Driver Setup Sequence  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Try This Driver Setup Sequence  #golfswing #golftips This setup drill is perfect if your stance gets too narrow with the driver or you struggle to hit up on the ball. Start with both feet together on the alignment stick, flare the left foot, then step the right foot out farther than feels natural. This creates the wider base you need for a stronger launch angle, better balance, and more consistent contact. A more stable, athletic stance often means more distance without swinging harder.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. This setup drill is perfect if your stance gets too narrow with the driver or you struggle to hit up on the ball. The Panthers, who are expected to lose A.J. Greer in free agency, acquired the veteran hit machine in a deal with the Philadelphia Flyers on Thursday.

Earlier in the week, Florida acquired Brady Tkachuk from Ottawa. 

Free agency opens on July 1.

videos.title: You don’t need 14 clubs to Break 90!
videos.summary_source_text:
You don’t need 14 clubs to Break 90! If you want to lower your handicap you need to take a serious look into your golf bag and make sure you have golf clubs that bring confidence to the golf course. Too often golfers set up their golf bags like a tour pro and lets be honest we are nothing like them.

videos.title: 🔴 LIVE | The Women's Amateur Championship Golf | Quarter & Semi Finals
videos.summary_source_text:
🔴 LIVE | The Women's Amateur Championship Golf | Quarter & Semi Finals SUBSCRIBE -  https://bit.ly/RandaGolfSubscribe

The championship, founded in 1893, attracts an international field with an impressive list of former winners including McCormack Medal winner Leona Maguire and major champions Georgia Hall and Anna Nordqvist.

This year's Women's Amateur Championship will take place at Muirfield in Scotland from 22-27 June. Muirfield hosted the AIG Women's Open in 2022 and is regarded as one of the best links courses in the world.

Paula Martin Sampedro claimed victory in The 122nd Women's Amateur Championship at Nairn in June 2025, the Spaniard edged out the USA's Farah O'Keefe 2&1 in a fabulous 36-hole final that saw both players excel.

videos.title: If Bread Needs This, Is It Still Bread?
videos.summary_source_text:
If Bread Needs This, Is It Still Bread? One of the simplest nutrition habits I recommend has nothing to do with calories or macros. Turn the package over. If a food that should be simple has a long list of additives, emulsifiers, and preservatives, that's a clue it's become a manufactured product rather than real food.

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

About Dr. Pradip Jamnadas, MD, MBBS, FACC, FSCAI, FCCP, FACP

The founder and Chief Medical Officer of Cardiovascular Interventions, P.A. in Orlando Florida where, since 1990,  he has been repeatedly recognized in local publications as a Top Doctor performing thousands of interventional procedures in hospital and out patient settings. As a consultant cardiologist with a large diversified inpatient and outpatient practice he is noted for his passions for teaching and illuminating prevention for cardiovascular disease . He is also a clinical assistant professor of medicine at The Florida State University and University of Central Florida. videos.title: Breathing 101
videos.summary_source_text:
Breathing 101 People often ask me what the most underrated health practice is. My answer is almost always the same: breathing.

It's something we all do, but very few of us do it well.

That's why breathing isn't just a standalone practice at YOGABODY—it's built into every class and every program we teach. I've seen firsthand how learning to breathe better can help with stress, sleep, focus, energy, and so much more.

If you've never explored breathwork before, this is your sign to start. Check out my programs at the link on my page.

videos.title: Gemini 4: 100 TRILLION Parameters | The Real Specs vs. the Hype (AGI?)
videos.summary_source_text:
Gemini 4: 100 TRILLION Parameters | The Real Specs vs. the Hype (AGI?) Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Gemini 4 is supposedly AGI with 100 trillion parameters and an overnight ChatGPT killer. I went through the leaks, the benchmarks, and Google's own announcements to find out what's actually true — and the most-repeated "fact" about it is almost certainly wrong.

In this video, I separate what's confirmed about Gemini 4 from what people are just guessing at: the realistic release window, which specs are real vs. rumored, how it stacks up against GPT-4 and Claude on actual benchmarks, and whether it's anywhere close to true AGI.

videos.title: What is RIFT? The Future of Trading & Smart Capital Allocation
videos.summary_source_text:
What is RIFT? The Future of Trading & Smart Capital Allocation What if the biggest problem in trading isn't market access... but the infrastructure behind it?

For years, financial technology has focused on giving people access to more markets, more exchanges, and more opportunities. Yet despite having access to cryptocurrencies, stocks, commodities, futures, and global financial markets from a smartphone, the vast majority of retail traders still struggle to achieve consistent results.

In this presentation, Shavez Ahmed Siddiqui explains why.

Rather than creating another trading app, RIFT has been designed as a complete trading ecosystem—bringing together education, automation, structured capital allocation, and intelligent market participation into one platform.

In this presentation you'll discover:

• Why professional investors focus on infrastructure rather than individual trades.
• How institutional capital differs from traditional retail trading.
• Why better systems often outperform better predictions.
• The philosophy behind RIFT's structured approach to market participation.
• How users can progress from complete beginners to advanced trading environments.

The RIFT Ecosystem

RIFT has been built as a complete participation framework that allows users to learn, practice, trade, automate and eventually scale.

The ecosystem includes:

✅ $10,000 Demo Trading Account

Practice in live market conditions using virtual funds before risking your own capital.

✅ Swipe Trading

A simplified trading interface designed to make market participation faster and more intuitive.

✅ Spot Trading

Buy and sell supported digital assets directly.

✅ Futures Trading

Access leveraged long and short positions with professional trading tools.

✅ Auto Trading Engine

RIFT's automated trading infrastructure uses multiple capital allocation strategies designed for different market conditions.

The Auto Engine currently consists of:

• Alpha Flow
• Smart Flow
• Micro Flow

Each flow focuses on a different style of market participation, helping create a diversified approach rather than relying on a single strategy.

Introducing RIFT Smart Money

One of the most exciting developments inside RIFT is Smart Money.

Instead of asking:

"What trade should I take today?"

Users begin thinking like professional capital managers:

"Which trading book should my capital participate in?"

Smart Money introduces structured trading books, transparent performance, isolated capital management through mirror wallets, and a portfolio-based approach inspired by institutional investing.

It's a shift from chasing individual trades toward participating in professionally managed trading environments.

Looking Ahead

The long-term vision for RIFT extends far beyond today's trading tools.

Future development aims to include:

• Advanced copy trading
• Prop trading infrastructure
• Intelligent capital allocation systems
• AI-assisted participation
• Advanced portfolio management
• High-frequency trading environments
• Expanded automated execution systems

The goal is to create a complete pathway where users can develop their skills, gain experience, access more sophisticated trading environments, and ultimately participate in larger capital opportunities.

A Different Philosophy

RIFT isn't built around hype or emotional trading.

Its philosophy is based on:

• Structured participation
• Intelligent capital allocation
• Risk management
• Education through experience
• Automation where appropriate
• Long-term scalability

The belief is simple:

The future of finance won't belong to those with access to more charts or more indicators.

It will belong to those with access to better infrastructure.

If institutional investors have spent decades building systems designed for consistency, transparency and disciplined execution, why shouldn't everyday participants have access to similar concepts?

That's the vision behind RIFT.

📺 Presented by Shavez Ahmed Siddiqui

If you enjoyed this presentation, don't forget to Like, Subscribe, and turn on notifications to follow future episodes covering market structure, institutional investing, AI-powered finance, trading psychology, capital allocation, and the evolution of modern financial infrastructure. videos.title: Get Pro-Level Compression
videos.summary_source_text: Get Pro-Level Compression Click link in bio for lowest price on the Blue Brick. In a proper downswing, I want my hands extremely low in front of my right leg—about 3–4 inches above my right knee with the shaft parallel to the ground—then I clear my body, let the butt end of the club raise through contact, and create a little shaft lean while still releasing the club aggressively. That low-hands/lean combo won’t just dig into the turf because there’s a “flat spot” and my body tilt plus rotation helps keep the strike shallow, especially on irons. To train it, I exaggerate a wedge-style impact position using my Blue Brick, then practice the drill with a 6/7/8 iron: pause hands over right knee, match the brick’s shaft lean with the sole flat, then fully release with my “X release” (arms crossing). The goal is a whipping snap through impact and better compression like the pros. Click link in bio for lowest price on the Blue Brick. videos.title: The REAL Reason Your Stomach Sticks Out (It’s Not Fat!)
videos.summary_source_text:
The REAL Reason Your Stomach Sticks Out (It’s Not Fat!) Why do some people experience persistent bloating or a distended stomach even without significant weight gain?

🌟 10 biological signals control how you feel every day, but only 1 matters most for YOUR body. Take the free 2-minute quiz to find out: https://drbrg.co/4aoNFzk

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

One possible explanation is related to gut balance and how certain foods interact with intestinal bacteria.

In some cases, an overgrowth of bacteria in the small intestine, often referred to as SIBO (small intestinal bacterial overgrowth), may contribute to symptoms like gas, bloating, and abdominal distension.

Certain dietary patterns high in refined carbohydrates may increase fermentable substrates in the gut, which can lead to excess gas production in sensitive individuals. These include ingredients such as refined flours, starches, and added sugars commonly found in processed foods.

videos.title: STOP Dementia Before It Starts (31 Proven Tips)
videos.summary_source_text:
STOP Dementia Before It Starts (31 Proven Tips) Early signs of dementia can show up years before a diagnosis. Discover 31 scientifically proven dementia prevention strategies designed to preserve cognitive function and support long-term brain health.

0:00 Introduction: What is dementia?
0:42 How to not get dementia
3:03 Stomach acid and dementia signs
5:40 DHA to improve cognitive function
7:20 Aluminum and brain function
9:45 Gum health and dementia
11:04 Hypoxic training for dementia prevention
14:51 Keto and intermittent fasting for dementia prevention
16:16 Genes and dementia 

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/3Sl1bhj

For more ways to support brain health and prevent dementia, watch these next: 
▶️ https://youtu.be/8iA49h1HpWA
▶️ https://youtu.be/hmBCXFJoUcY
▶️ https://youtu.be/n8zzRq8aMo8

For more tips on improving memory and focus, check out this article: https://drbrg.co/49VRfkn

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Dementia is not an inevitable part of aging. Many of the risk factors linked to cognitive decline, memory loss, and dementia are connected to lifestyle, nutrition, metabolic health, and chronic inflammation. High-carb diets and vitamin deficiencies are often contributing factors. 

Nutrient deficiencies, insulin resistance, poor sleep, environmental toxins, hormone imbalances, and gut health can all affect cognitive function and increase dementia risk.

Taking a proactive approach to brain health can help preserve cognitive function, support healthy aging, and reduce the risk of dementia over time.

Certain genetic factors can increase your risk for dementia, but they are not in control! Focus on a healthy diet and lifestyle changes for your best defense against dementia.

videos.title: Claude Tag Tutorial: AI Agent Living in Slack
videos.summary_source_text:
Claude Tag Tutorial: AI Agent Living in Slack 📚 Join AI Agents & Automation Builders: https://mrc.fm/cmc

Claude Tag is Anthropic's new AI teammate that lives inside Slack — you @mention @Claude, hand it a task in plain English, and it plans the work, writes code, opens pull requests, and reports back in the thread. It's the multiplayer evolution of Claude Code, it runs on Opus 4.8, and in this video I set it up from scratch to work with a team.

I'll show you exactly how to connect Claude Tag to GitHub, how to connect it to Google, how to give your agent its own identity so it isn't borrowing your logins, how to set spend limits so it doesn't run up a bill, and how ambient mode + scheduled tasks turn it into a teammate that works while you sleep.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

videos.title: SCHEDULES ANYONE? Carolina Hurricanes Announce 26-27 Preseason & Prospect Development Camp Schedules
videos.summary_source_text:
SCHEDULES ANYONE? Carolina Hurricanes Announce 26-27 Preseason & Prospect Development Camp Schedules On Thursday morning, the Carolina Hurricanes released their 2026-27 preseason schedule, along with the Prospect Development schedule, which will begin on Sunday, June 28. What should fans expect from both? On the Friday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on the 2026-27 preseason schedule, which will include four games with the Nashville Predators and the Florida Panthers. Both sets of games will be home-and-home, starting with the Panthers. The four games will span over six days, with games being two days apart from each other. Secondly, the Hurricanes release their prospect development schedule, with some players already named to the roster. While the full roster won't be announced until probably Saturday night or Sunday morning, who could fans expect to see this Sunday through next Thursday, July 2? Finally, Zach goes over the four picks the Hurricanes have in the upcoming NHL Draft. While they have four right now, could there be trades to get more draft capital? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Valet och skatterna- Kristdemokraternas
videos.summary_source_text:
Valet och skatterna- Kristdemokraternas Kristdemokraterna vill sänka inkomstskatter och ge folk mer att leva på 

Sjunde intervjun i serien är med Kristdemokraternas skattepolitiska talesperson Cecilia Engström, som intervjuas av PwC:s skatteexpert Oscar Warglo. I fokus står sänkta inkomstskatter. Cecilia Engström lyfter att Kristdemokraterna vill att vanligt folk ska kunna leva på sina inkomster och håller fast vid devisen "Hälften kvar". Partiet vill även trappa ner reavinstskatten på fastigheter så att den efter 16 års ägande är noll, samt införa lägre arbetsgivaravgifter för de fem först anställda i små företag. Kristdemokraterna är på sikt öppna för en bred skatteöverenskommelse, förutsatt att inkomstskatten inte höjs. Partiet säger nej till fastighetsskatt, arvs- och gåvoskatt samt förmögenhetsskatt. videos.title: Hindi - 25.06.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi - 25.06.26 - RIFT Presentation RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

RIFT is built around a simple vision: making modern trading technology more accessible while helping users participate in financial markets through a combination of automation, education, and innovative infrastructure. videos.title: Avalanche Trade Val Nichushkin to Columbus For Three Picks. Could They Have Got More?
videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche Trade Val Nichushkin to Columbus For Three Picks. Could They Have Got More? Colorado Avalanche fans reel as Valeri Nichushkin is traded to the Columbus Blue Jackets for a surprising package of picks. With only a 2026 second-rounder, a 2027 third, and a 2028 fifth coming back, questions swirl about the front office’s strategy and whether the return fits Nichushkin's value as a top-six forward with term and a manageable cap hit. Can the Avalanche replace Nichushkin’s production, or did they move too soon on a player with more to offer?

Hosts Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson weigh the merits of the deal, drawing comparisons to recent blockbuster trades like Bo Byram’s and Brady Tkachuk’s, and speculate on Joe Sakic’s next move. The episode also grades Brock Nelson’s season, debates free agency options, and explores Colorado’s reshaped cap space. Can the Avalanche parlay this newfound flexibility into a deeper playoff run, or did they sacrifice too much in the chase for a fresh start?

videos.title: Should My AI Coding Agent be Open Source?
videos.summary_source_text:
Should My AI Coding Agent be Open Source? Join the community: https://mrc.fm/cmc

I built Tank to run my own AI coding agents and it has taken on a life of its own.
So today I am going live to clear up what Tank actually is, and to talk about
something a lot of you have been asking for.

Quick version: Tank is mission control for AI coding agents. You give an agent a
task, it runs in a real terminal you can watch and jump into, with live feedback, a
build queue for overnight work, and scheduled jobs. A human stays in the loop the
whole way. It is not auto merge and it is not a black box. It is your command centre
for Claude Code, Codex, Grok and more.

Now the big one. A lot of you have asked me to open it up so you can run the code
yourself. I have been seriously exploring exactly that: an open, source available
core you could try, self host and build on, with the advanced features as optional
modules. Today I want to tease where this is heading and hear from you.

So come and tell me: would you run Tank yourself? Would you build a module? Should
the core be open? Bring your questions, I am answering live.

I built Tank to run my own AI coding agents and it has taken on a life of its own.
So today I am going live to clear up what Tank actually is, and to talk about
something a lot of you have been asking for.

Quick version: Tank is mission control for AI coding agents. You give an agent a
task, it runs in a real terminal you can watch and jump into, with live feedback, a
build queue for overnight work, and scheduled jobs. A human stays in the loop the
whole way. It is not auto merge and it is not a black box. It is your command centre
for Claude Code, Codex, Grok and more.

Now the big one. A lot of you have asked me to open it up so you can run the code
yourself. I have been seriously exploring exactly that: an open, source available
core you could try, self host and build on, with the advanced features as optional
modules. Today I want to tease where this is heading and hear from you.

So come and tell me: would you run Tank yourself? Would you build a module? Should
the core be open? Bring your questions, I am answering live.

videos.title: Is It Wrong To Use A Snapshot Here?
videos.summary_source_text:
Is It Wrong To Use A Snapshot Here? The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

👉  Drills, breakdowns, progressions, and full mechanics playbook (100's of videos) all available in Train 2.0+ here: https://app.train2point0.com/bundles/membership-plus

About Train 2.0:
Train 2.0 is an online hockey development platform founded by Jason Yee: kinesiologist, former professional player, and UBC honors graduate. We give players and coaches a mechanical advantage by reverse-engineering elite NHL movements and making them available to players at every level.

https://train2point0.thinkific.com/courses/free-training

#train2point0 #downhillskating #hockeytraining #NHL The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: They're Lying About AI "Brain Rot"
videos.summary_source_text:
They're Lying About AI "Brain Rot" Here's the truth about that MIT AI study everyone's been referencing.

Yes, leaning on AI too early or too completely can make you "dumber." But the full study reveals a much more nuanced reality: human skill + AI performs better than human skill alone.

When you already know how to think critically, AI becomes a superpower. When you use it to replace all critical thinking, well... you may lose the ability to think for yourself 🤷‍♂️

What's another AI claim you keep hearing about that's not entirely true, or more complicated than people are saying?

videos.title: 15 Years of Driver Development... TaylorMade Should Be Panicking
videos.summary_source_text:
15 Years of Driver Development... TaylorMade Should Be Panicking TaylorMade claims its latest driver technology can help golfers gain up to 15 more yards off the tee but is that really true?

In this video, I put 15 years of driver development to the test by comparing a modern TaylorMade driver against one of the most iconic drivers ever made, the TaylorMade R11. With all the advancements in driver technology, forgiveness, ball speed, aerodynamics, carbon construction, and AI face design, you would expect a huge difference in performance.

But the results might surprise you.

If you're looking for the best driver for distance, wondering whether new driver technology is worth the upgrade, or trying to find out if modern drivers really hit the ball further, this test reveals some eye opening truths. We analyse ball speed, carry distance, total distance, forgiveness, launch conditions, spin rates, and consistency to see whether today's drivers genuinely deliver more performance.

In this TaylorMade driver review, you'll discover:

Does a new driver really give you 15 more yards? How much has driver technology improved in 15 years? TaylorMade R11 vs Modern TaylorMade Driver, Best golf drivers for distance in 2026, Are premium driver upgrades worth the money? Driver forgiveness, ball speed and launch monitor data, What golfers should know before buying a new driver

Whether you're a beginner golfer, mid handicap player, or low handicap golfer searching for more distance and accuracy off the tee, this comparison will help you make a smarter buying decision.

Looking for the best golf driver? Want more distance without changing your swing? Curious if older golf clubs can compete with today's technology? Watch until the end to see the full results.

videos.title: Stop Chunking: The ‘Downhill’ Weight Shift
videos.summary_source_text:
Stop Chunking: The ‘Downhill’ Weight Shift Click link in bio for lowest price on the Ball First Board. 
Now, the most important part of your weight shift is what I call going downhill. Imagine I'm on a, a giant mountain, a slope. I'm on a snowboard here, and I'm sliding downhill. I feel like I slide to the left. I get my weight over my lead side, specifically on the outside of my lead ankle.

My weight gets to the inside of my right foot, and then once I'm downhill here, I haven't started my downswing yet. My arms are still back in the, in the backswing position here. I get my weight left, then I come on through to the finish. You're gonna see that with every great player. That's one thing I designed in this Ball First Board. 

This is a brand-new training aid that I just released, just came out with. Spent over a year and a half designing this. These sticks are gonna tell you if I'm doing this downhill piece right, along with the foot pedal. So I'm gonna make my backswing here, and before I start my downswing, I'm gonna start going downhill.

There's two things I'll feel when I'm doing this correctly. Number one, I'm gonna feel like my weight gets over this lead stick,  so my, my outside of my lead leg actually bumps into this stick. That's good. That's what I should be feeling. And I'm gonna feel like the inside of my right foot is angled in, and I have this pedal to kinda help push me over there.

So I'm gonna feel like everything's going downhill. Once I get here, then I can turn on through to the finish. In a real golf swing, I'm gonna feel the weight transfer to the inside of this foot. A lot of times you'll hear people talk about rolling that foot in. That's exactly what I should be feeling like.

So backswing,  I'm gonna shift downhill.  This stick is in my lead leg. You see how my back foot is rolled in. The pressure's on the inside of my foot, and then from there, I'm gonna turn all the way on through to the finish. • Add height, control and distance

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

videos.title: Almedalen 2026 - torsdag 25 juni
videos.summary_source_text:
Almedalen 2026 - torsdag 25 juni 8.15-9.00
Digital tillit och federativ infrastruktur – nyckeln till säker samverkan mellan aktörer
Offentlig sektor och näringsliv behöver i allt högre grad dela data och använda gemensamma tjänster. Hur förenklas detta genom digital tillit? Hur skapar vi en infrastruktur som möjliggör säker samverkan utan att varje aktör bygger egna lösningar?

9.30-10.15
När AI blir en kollega: Vem gör vad – och vem bär ansvaret?

AI har gått från att vara ett passivt verktyg till att bli en aktör som fattar beslut och driver arbetsflöden. Det ställer helt nya krav på hur ansvar fördelas, hur ledare leder och hur medarbetare samverkar med tekniken. Hur rustar vi organisationer för den förändringen – och vem bär ansvaret?

10.45-11.30 
Att följa pengarna – vad är bankernas roll i kampen mot välfärdsbrottsligheten?

Den kriminella ekonomin omsätter 352 miljarder kronor per år och välfärdsbrott är en växande del. Banker har en unik insyn i transaktioner, mönster och avvikelser som tidigt kan signalera missbruk av välfärdssystemen. Vad är bankernas roll i arbetet mot välfärdsbrottsligheten?

13.00-13.45 
Kan AI stärka demokratin och lösa samhällsproblem – på riktigt?

Kan AI användas för att sänka trösklar till demokratiskt deltagande, öka ungas valdeltagande och bygga förtroende för samhällets institutioner? Hur går vi från teknik och vision till att lösa stora samhällsutmaningar inom områden som klimat, hälsa, utbildning, inkludering och humanitärt arbete?

14.15-15.00 
Ett energisystem som håller – hur säkrar vi Sveriges framtida energiförsörjning?

Energibehoven ökar, och tillgång till säker och tillförlitlig energi till rimlig kostnad är avgörande för samhälle, företag och människor. Geopolitisk osäkerhet pressar systemet – men kan också påskynda omställningen. Så hur formar vi gemensamt en hållbar energiinfrastruktur för Sverige?

15.30-16.15 
Hur kan vi använda AI på ett säkert och förtroendeskapande sätt?

AI förändrar både offentlig och privat sektor i grunden – men hur hanterar vi riskerna när användningen ökar? Hur säkerställer vi att teknikutvecklingen går hand i hand med säkerhet, ansvar och efterlevnad av regler?

Läs mer här: https://www.pwc.se/sv/almedalen.html 8.15-9.00

videos.title: Shallow the Club in Transition
videos.summary_source_text: Shallow the Club in Transition Click link in bio for lowest price on the Blue Brick. I’m sharing one of my favorite drills to help you shallow the club in transition and keep the momentum moving the right way into the downswing. I add an alignment stick into the butt end of the club, let it slide down my right leg in the backswing to keep the clubhead out, then keep that same momentum through transition so the shaft shallows on plane. From there I point the butt end toward the ball, strike it, and keep rotating to the finish—making sure the right toe and foot pivot through. Then I use my Blue Brick set to the six iron vertical swing plane (the same angle pros use) to match the feel and get instant feedback by coming down parallel to the stick for the right amount of shallowing. #golf #golfswing #golfdrill #shallowing #downswing #transition #sixiron #ballstriking #golftraining #alignmentstick #bluebrick Click link in bio for lowest price on the Blue Brick. Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Ringing in the ears is often associated with past exposure to loud noise, but there may be additional factors involved.

Tinnitus is believed to originate in the brain rather than the ears themselves. When hearing loss occurs at a specific frequency, the brain may generate a sound to compensate for the missing signal.

Chronically elevated blood sugar can affect the tiny nerves and blood vessels of the inner ear. Many people have blood sugar problems for years without realizing it because insulin levels can rise long before blood sugar levels become noticeably abnormal.

Supporting healthy blood sugar levels may play an important role in tinnitus relief. Reducing carbohydrate intake and incorporating fasting may help support healthy insulin levels and improve nutrient delivery to the small blood vessels that support hearing.

These two nutrients help support nerve health and cardiovascular function for natural tinnitus relief:
1. Alpha-lipoic acid
2. Benfotiamine

Some people report improvements relatively quickly, while others may require more time depending on the underlying factors involved.

If you're fighting your downswing, the real fix is probably in your backswing. Eric Cogorno and JT Thomas break down how to combine the correct shoulder turn with the correct hip rotation during the backswing to set up an easy, repeatable downswing. Once you get your hips moving correctly, the feeling is simple: they should never stop going. These golf drills give you simple feels and checkpoints so you stop fighting compensations on the way down and start fixing the cause. If you leave this video without trying the left side bend drill, you're leaving consistency on the table.

What You'll Learn:
• Why most downswing problems are actually caused by a flawed backswing
• The correct lead shoulder position: down and in toward the midline of the body
• The left side bend drill and how to feel it without using your hips
• Why a flat shoulder turn forces a steep, crashing downswing
• How the trail hip should rotate up and toward the target during the backswing
• The fist-width checkpoint for proper hip rotation
• Why your hips should never stop moving forward once they start
• The long lead shoulder drill for checking your backswing position at home

videos.title: Homey Stories — The Home That Opens the Door for Peter
videos.summary_source_text:
Homey Stories — The Home That Opens the Door for Peter Peter started using Homey as a hobby to automate a couple of garden lights. After a brain hemorrhage, he came back to it with a different question: could the same system help him stay in his own home?

Three years ago, Peter spent three weeks in a coma and lost his ability to speak. The Homey Pro he’d set up as a hobby became part of how he gets through the day. The curtains open by themselves, and he controls the lights and front door from his phone.

Rob from ROBBshop has known Peter for years and helped adapt his home. Peter’s Homey Story shows how a few simple Flows can make a real difference when everyday tasks get harder.

Read Peter’s story
  ↳ https://homey.app/en-us/blog/peters-accessible-smart-home/

More Homey Stories
  ↳ https://homey.app/en-us/blog/category/homey-stories/

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.
